    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # BM25 with Title Boost
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Candidates: Union of top semantic and top BM25
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Feature Engineering
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    
    # Semantic similarity
    idx_map = {idx: 1.0/(1.0+d) for idx, d in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    c_semantic = np.array([idx_map.get(i, 0.0) for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # Genre match
    c_genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_match = np.array([1.0 if any(g in q for g in tokens) else 0.0 for q, genres in zip([query]*len(c_genres), c_genres)])
    
    # Title match boost
    c_titles = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['title'].str.lower()
    title_match = np.array([1.5 if any(t in title for t in tokens) else 1.0 for title in c_titles])
    
    # Popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'])
    pop = (pop - pop.mean()) / (pop.std() + 1e-9)

    # Sort and return

    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # Use larger pool for RRF to ensure recall
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25 = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    top_faiss = idxs[0]
    
    # RRF dictionary
    rrf = {}
    
    # BM25 RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(np.argsort(bm25_scores[top_bm25])[::-1]):
        actual_idx = top_bm25[idx]
        rrf[actual_idx] = rrf.get(actual_idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for rank, actual_idx in enumerate(top_faiss):
        rrf[actual_idx] = rrf.get(actual_idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    candidate_indices = np.array(list(rrf.keys()))
    scores = np.array(list(rrf.values()))
    
    # Popularity boost: log scale
    pop = np.log1p(df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.mean()) / (pop.std() + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre signal: soft overlap
    q_genres = [t for t in tokens if t in ["drama", "comedy", "thriller", "horror", "action", "sci-fi", "romance", "adventure"]]
    if q_genres:
        genre_matches = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower()
        genre_bonus = np.array([sum(g in row for g in q_genres) for row in genre_matches])
        scores += 0.1 * genre_bonus
        
    scores += 0.05 * pop
    
    # Sort and return
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval with title boost
    # Build a weighted BM25-like signal: standard bm25_scores
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    # Candidate pool
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # RRF calculation
    def get_rank(arr, idx):
        res = np.where(arr == idx)[0]
        return res[0] + 1 if len(res) > 0 else 1000
    
    # BM25 ranks
    bm25_sorted = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[::-1]
    # Semantic ranks
    sem_sorted = idxs[0]
    
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        r1 = get_rank(bm25_sorted, idx)
        r2 = get_rank(sem_sorted, idx)
        rrf_scores[idx] = (1.0 / (60.0 + r1)) + (1.0 / (60.0 + r2))
        
    # Genre signal
    genres = df['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_match = np.array([sum(t in g for t in tokens) for g in genres])
    
    # Popularity bias (dampened)
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'])
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Final score: RRF + Genre Boost + Pop Bias
    final_scores = rrf_scores + (0.1 * genre_match) + (0.05 * pop)
    
    # Return top K
    top_indices = np.argpartition(final_scores, -top_k)[-top_k:]
    top_indices = top_indices[np.argsort(final_scores[top_indices])[::-1]]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores[top_indices]
    return res.to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 100)
    
    # Get top candidates from both
    bm25_top_n = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-100:]
    faiss_top_n = idxs[0]
    
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([bm25_top_n, faiss_top_n]))
    
    # Calculate RRF scores
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 contribution
    sorted_bm25 = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidate_indices])[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(sorted_bm25):
        rrf_scores[candidate_indices[idx]] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic contribution
    for rank, idx in enumerate(faiss_top_n):
        if idx != -1:
            rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
            
    # Title match boost: if query tokens match words in title, boost rank
    titles = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['title'].str.lower().values
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        title_tokens = _bm25_tokenize(titles[i])
        match_count = sum(1 for t in tokens if t in title_tokens)
        rrf_scores[idx] += (match_count * 0.1)
        
    # Final sort
    top_indices = np.argsort(rrf_scores[candidate_indices])[::-1][:top_k]
    result_indices = candidate_indices[top_indices]
    
    res = df.iloc[result_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = rrf_scores[result_indices]
    return res.to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. BM25 Retrieval (Lexical)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # 2. Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 100)
    
    # 3. Candidate Selection
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -100)[-100:]
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # 4. Feature Extraction for Ranking
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    
    # Semantic scores via inverse L2 distance
    idx_map = {idx: 1.0/(1.0+d) for idx, d in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    c_semantic = np.array([idx_map.get(i, 0.0) for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # Genre signal: binary match
    c_df = df.iloc[candidate_indices]
    genre_match = np.array([1.0 if any(g in q_part for g in c_df.iloc[i]['genres'].lower().split(', ')) 
                            for i in range(len(c_df)) for q_part in tokens])
    # Correction for shape
    genre_match = np.array([1.0 if any(t in str(g).lower() for t in tokens) else 0.0 
                            for g in c_df['genres']])
    
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(c_df['vote_count'])
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # 5. Hybrid Scoring via weighted combination
    # We prioritize semantic/bm25 but boost via genre and popularity
    bm25_norm = (c_bm25 - c_bm25.min()) / (c_bm25.max() - c_bm25.min() + 1e-9)
    sem_norm = (c_semantic - c_semantic.min()) / (c_semantic.max() - c_semantic.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = (0.4 * bm25_norm) + (0.4 * sem_norm) + (0.1 * genre_match) + (0.1 * pop)
    
    # Sort and return
    res = c_df.copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    # RRF with Candidate Pool
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(candidate_indices))
    
    # Map index to position
    bm25_ranks = {idx: rank for rank, idx in enumerate(np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidate_indices])[::-1])}
    faiss_ranks = {idx: rank for rank, idx in enumerate(idxs[0])}
    
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        score = 0.0
        if idx in bm25_ranks:
            score += 1.0 / (60 + bm25_ranks[idx])
        if idx in faiss_ranks:
            score += 1.0 / (60 + faiss_ranks[idx])
        
        # Genre signal: intersection boost
        genres = str(df.iloc[idx]['genres']).lower()
        if any(token in genres for token in tokens):
            score *= 1.5
            
        # Popularity boost: non-linear normalized vote_count
        votes = df.iloc[idx]['vote_count']
        score *= (1.0 + np.log1p(votes) / 20.0)
        
        rrf_scores[i] = score
        
    # Sort and return
    top_indices = candidate_indices[np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = rrf_scores[np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return res.to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval: 500 candidates
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-500:][::-1]
    
    # Semantic Retrieval: 500 candidates
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 500)
    
    # RRF dictionary
    rank_scores = {}
    
    # BM25 RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(top_bm25_idx):
        rank_scores[idx] = rank_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        rank_scores[idx] = rank_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Popularity and Genre boost
    candidate_indices = np.array(list(rank_scores.keys()))
    scores = np.array([rank_scores[i] for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # Genre signal: binary match
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].astype(str).str.lower()
    genre_match = np.array([1.5 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 1.0 for g in genres])
    
    # Popularity boost: normalize vote count
    votes = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'].values
    pop_boost = 1.0 + (votes / (votes.max() + 1e-9)) * 0.2
    
    final_scores = scores * genre_match * pop_boost
    
    # Create result DF
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. BM25 Search with Title Boost
    # Create artificial boost by treating title as more important in text
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # 2. Semantic Search
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    # 3. RRF Combination
    # Get ranks for all candidates
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:], idxs[0]]))
    
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(bm25_ranks[:200]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Semantic Ranks
    for r, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # 4. Genre and Popularity Boost
    genre_signal = df['genres'].apply(lambda g: any(t in g.lower() for t in tokens) if isinstance(g, str) else False)
    pop_signal = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].fillna(0))
    pop_norm = (pop_signal - pop_signal.min()) / (pop_signal.max() - pop_signal.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores[all_indices] + (0.15 * genre_signal.iloc[all_indices].values) + (0.05 * pop_norm.iloc[all_indices].values)
    
    res = df.iloc[all_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25 = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    top_faiss = idxs[0]
    
    # RRF scoring
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25, top_faiss]))
    rrf_score = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 RRF
    sorted_bm25 = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidate_indices])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices[sorted_bm25]):
        rrf_score[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # FAISS RRF
    for r, idx in enumerate(top_faiss):
        rrf_score[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Genre boost: simple overlap
    final_scores = rrf_score[candidate_indices]
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_bonus = [0.1 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 0.0 for g in genres]
    final_scores += np.array(genre_bonus)
    
    # Popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'])
    pop = (pop - pop.mean()) / (pop.std() + 1e-9)
    final_scores += 0.05 * pop
    
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval with title-boosted scores
    # Pre-calculated BM25 scores can be scaled by title match density
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    
    # Candidate Set (top 150 from both)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # RRF scoring
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 RRF
    bm25_sorted = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(bm25_sorted[:150]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        if idx != -1:
            rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
            
    # Genre-boosted re-ranking
    # Identify genre match
    query_genres = [t for t in tokens if t in ["action", "adventure", "animation", "comedy", "crime", "documentary", "drama", "family", "fantasy", "history", "horror", "music", "mystery", "romance", "science", "thriller", "war", "western"]]
    
    if query_genres:
        for idx in candidate_indices:
            movie_genres = str(df.iloc[idx]['genres']).lower()
            if any(g in movie_genres for g in query_genres):
                rrf_scores[idx] *= 1.25
                
    # Title-match boost (Bonus for exact title word presence)
    title_tokens = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['title'].str.lower().tolist()
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        match_count = sum(1 for t in tokens if t in title_tokens[i])
        if match_count > 0:
            rrf_scores[idx] *= (1.0 + 0.1 * match_count)
            
    # Final sort
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = rrf_scores[candidate_indices]
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):

    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -250)[-250:]

    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 Rank
    bm25_rank = np.argsort(np.argsort(-bm25_scores))
    rrf_scores[candidate_indices] += 1.0 / (60.0 + bm25_rank[candidate_indices])
    
    # Semantic Rank
    sem_rank = np.argsort(np.argsort(dists[0]))

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-200:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    # Normalize scores to 0-1 for Fusion
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # BM25 scores
    b_scores = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    b_scores = (b_scores - b_scores.min()) / (b_scores.max() - b_scores.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Semantic scores (convert L2 distance to similarity)
    s_scores = np.zeros(len(candidate_indices))
    idx_map = {idx: 1.0 / (1.0 + d) for idx, d in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        s_scores[i] = idx_map.get(idx, 0.0)
    s_scores = (s_scores - s_scores.min()) / (s_scores.max() - s_scores.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre boost: 1.2x if query tokens appear in genres
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower().values
    genre_boost = np.array([1.2 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 1.0 for g in genres])
    
    # Popularity boost: normalized vote count
    pop = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'].values
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Combine
    final_scores = (0.4 * b_scores + 0.5 * s_scores) * genre_boost + (0.1 * pop)
    
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")
description: improve hybrid retrieval by combining BM25 and semantic scores using a normalized rank fusion with genre-specific boost

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # RRF Constants
    k = 60
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:], idxs[0]]))
    
    # RRF ranks
    ranks = {}
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    bm25_c = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    bm25_sort = np.argsort(-bm25_c)
    for r, i in enumerate(bm25_sort):
        idx = candidate_indices[i]
        ranks[idx] = ranks.get(idx, 0.0) + 1.0 / (k + r)
        
    # Semantic Ranks
    for r, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        if idx != -1:
            ranks[idx] = ranks.get(idx, 0.0) + 1.0 / (k + r)
            
    # Genre/Popularity features
    subset = df.iloc[candidate_indices]
    
    # Genre alignment
    genres = subset['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_boost = np.array([1.2 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 1.0 for g in genres])
    
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(subset['vote_count'])
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = np.array([ranks.get(i, 0.0) for i in candidate_indices]) * genre_boost + (0.05 * pop)
    
    res = subset.copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60.0 + rank)
        
    # 3. Genre alignment boost
    query_genres = [t for t in tokens if t in ["action", "adventure", "animation", "comedy", "crime", "documentary", "drama", "family", "fantasy", "history", "horror", "music", "mystery", "romance", "scifi", "thriller", "war", "western"]]
    if query_genres:
        genre_matches = df['genres'].apply(lambda x: sum(1 for g in query_genres if g in x.lower()))
        rrf_scores += 0.2 * (genre_matches / (genre_matches.max() + 1e-9))
        
    # 4. Final Rank
    top_indices = np.argpartition(rrf_scores[candidate_indices], -top_k)[-top_k:]
    final_indices = candidate_indices[top_indices]
    
    res = df.iloc[final_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = rrf_scores[final_indices]
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Semantic Retrieval (pool 250)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 250)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval (pool 250)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -250)[-250:]
    
    # Combine and RRF
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 RRF
    bm25_sorted = np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_indices])[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(bm25_sorted):
        rrf_scores[all_indices[idx]] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Popularity and Genre boost
    # Use vote_average * log(vote_count + 1) as a ranking signal
    popularity_boost = df['vote_average'] * np.log1p(df['vote_count'])
    popularity_boost = (popularity_boost - popularity_boost.mean()) / (popularity_boost.std() + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre signal: binary match
    genre_match = df['genres'].apply(lambda g: any(t in g.lower() for t in tokens)).astype(float)
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores + (0.05 * popularity_boost) + (0.1 * genre_match)
    
    top_results = np.argpartition(final_scores, -top_k)[-top_k:]
    return df.iloc[top_results].sort_values(by="vote_count", ascending=False).to_dict("records")

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. Retrieve candidates
    # BM25 scores for full text
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -100)[-100:]
    
    # Semantic scores
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 100)
    
    # 2. RRF Rank Fusion
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # Rank BM25
    sorted_bm25 = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidate_indices])[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices[sorted_bm25]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Rank Semantic
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        if idx != -1:
            rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
            
    # 3. Apply Genre/Popularity Reranking
    final_scores = rrf_scores[candidate_indices]
    
    # Genre boost: check if any query token is in genres
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_boost = np.array([1.2 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 1.0 for g in genres])
    
    # Popularity bias
    pop = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'].values
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = final_scores * genre_boost * (1.0 + 0.1 * pop_norm)
    
    # 4. Return top K
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    # RRF mapping
    rrf_scores = {}
    
    # BM25 RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(np.argsort(bm25_scores[top_bm25_idx])[::-1]):
        actual_idx = top_bm25_idx[idx]
        rrf_scores[actual_idx] = rrf_scores.get(actual_idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    candidate_indices = np.array(list(rrf_scores.keys()))
    scores = np.array([rrf_scores[i] for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # Genre & Popularity Boost
    genre_series = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_boost = np.array([1.5 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 1.0 
                           for g in genre_series])
    
    pop_boost = np.log1p(df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'])
    pop_boost = (pop_boost - pop_boost.min()) / (pop_boost.max() - pop_boost.min() + 1e-9)
    pop_boost = 1.0 + (0.2 * pop_boost)
    
    final_scores = scores * genre_boost * pop_boost
    
    # Rank and Return
    top_indices = candidate_indices[np.argsort(final_scores)[::-1][:top_k]]
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores[np.argsort(final_scores)[::-1][:top_k]]
    return res.to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. Candidate Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -250)[-250:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 250)
    
    # 2. RRF Scores
    candidate_map = {}
    for i, rank in enumerate(top_bm25_idx):
        candidate_map[rank] = candidate_map.get(rank, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + (250 - i))
        
    for i, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        candidate_map[idx] = candidate_map.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + i)
        
    candidates = np.array(list(candidate_map.keys()))
    rrf_scores = np.array(list(candidate_map.values()))
    
    # 3. Features for Reranking
    subset = df.iloc[candidates]
    
    # Genre Match
    genre_scores = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    for i, row_genres in enumerate(subset['genres']):
        row_tokens = _bm25_tokenize(row_genres)
        match = sum(1 for t in tokens if t in row_tokens)
        genre_scores[i] = match / (len(row_tokens) + 1.0)
        
    # Popularity Bias (Log-normalized)
    pop = np.log1p(subset['vote_count'])
    pop = (pop - pop.mean()) / (pop.std() + 1e-9)
    
    # Final Fusion
    final_scores = (0.7 * rrf_scores) + (0.2 * genre_scores) + (0.1 * pop)
    
    # 4. Sort and return
    res = subset.copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)

    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -250)[-250:]

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval (1000 candidates to increase recall)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -500)[-500:]
    
    # Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 500)
    
    # Combine unique candidates
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # RRF calculation
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 RRF contribution
    bm25_sort = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidate_indices])[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(bm25_sort):
        rrf_scores[candidate_indices[idx]] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF contribution
    semantic_sort = np.argsort(dists[0])[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(semantic_sort):
        rrf_scores[idxs[0][idx]] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Genre-Affinity Boost
    # Increase score if any query token matches genre
    genre_series = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower()

    # Popularity normalization
    pop = np.log1p(df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'])
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9) * 0.1
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores[candidate_indices] + genre_boost + pop
    
    # Sort and return
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")

    sorted_bm25 = np.argsort(bm25_scores)
    for rank, idx in enumerate(sorted_bm25[-300:]):

    for rank, idx in enumerate(faiss_top_idx):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Apply genre-title affinity boost
    final_scores = rrf_scores[candidate_indices]

    genre_matches = []

        score = sum(1.0 for t in tokens if t in movie_genres)

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -250)[-250:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 250)
    
    # 2. RRF Ranking
    # Maps for O(1) rank lookup
    bm25_ranks = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(np.argsort(bm25_scores[top_bm25_idx])[::-1])}
    semantic_ranks = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(idxs[0])}
    
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(all_indices))
    k = 60
    for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices):
        score = 0.0
        if idx in bm25_ranks:
            score += 1.0 / (k + bm25_ranks[idx])
        if idx in semantic_ranks:
            score += 1.0 / (k + semantic_ranks[idx])
        rrf_scores[i] = score
        
    # 3. Genre/Popularity Boosting
    genres = df.iloc[all_indices]['genres'].str.lower().values
    vote_count = df.iloc[all_indices]['vote_count'].values
    
    genre_boost = np.array([1.2 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 1.0 for g in genres])
    pop_boost = 1.0 + np.log1p(vote_count) / np.log1p(df['vote_count'].max())
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores * genre_boost * pop_boost
    
    # 4. Results
    res = df.iloc[all_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores

    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):

    # Expand candidate pool to capture long-tail
    pool_size = 500

    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    # Semantic Retrieval

    # RRF Constants
    k_rrf = 60
    ranks = {}
    
    # Score BM25 Ranks
    for r, idx in enumerate(np.argsort(bm25_scores[top_bm25_idx])[::-1]):
        real_idx = top_bm25_idx[idx]
        ranks[real_idx] = ranks.get(real_idx, 0) + 1 / (k_rrf + r)
        
    # Score Semantic Ranks
    for r, real_idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        ranks[real_idx] = ranks.get(real_idx, 0) + 1 / (k_rrf + r)
        
    # Genre Boosting
    candidate_indices = list(ranks.keys())
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower()
    
    final_scores = []
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        score = ranks[idx]
        # Genre signal: boost if any query token is in genres
        genre_str = genres.iloc[i]
        if any(token in genre_str for token in tokens):
            score *= 1.2
        final_scores.append(score)
        
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Prepare RRF scores
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 RRF
    sorted_bm25 = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidate_indices])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(sorted_bm25):
        rrf_scores[candidate_indices[idx]] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for r, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        if idx != -1:
            rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
            
    # Genre Boosting
    genres = df['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_bonus = np.array([0.1 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 0.0 for g in genres])
    
    # Popularity Bias
    pop_bias = np.log1p(df['vote_count'])
    pop_bias = (pop_bias - pop_bias.mean()) / (pop_bias.std() + 1e-9) * 0.05
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores + genre_bonus + pop_bias
    
    # Return top K
    top_indices = np.argpartition(final_scores, -top_k)[-top_k:]
    top_indices = top_indices[np.argsort(final_scores[top_indices])[::-1]]

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    query_tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(query_tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -400)[-400:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 400)
    
    # RRF aggregation
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Scoring dictionaries for RRF
    rrf_scores = {idx: 0.0 for idx in candidate_indices}
    
    # BM25 rank
    b_sorted = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidate_indices])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices[b_sorted]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Semantic rank
    s_sorted = np.argsort(dists[0])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(idxs[0][s_sorted]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Boost title matches
    title_tokens = [set(_bm25_tokenize(t)) for t in df.iloc[candidate_indices]['title']]
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        match_count = sum(1 for token in query_tokens if token in title_tokens[i])
        rrf_scores[idx] *= (1.0 + 0.5 * match_count)
        
    # Genre affinity
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower()
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        g_str = genres.iloc[i]
        match = sum(1 for token in query_tokens if token in g_str)
        rrf_scores[idx] *= (1.0 + 0.2 * match)
        
    # Finalize
    scores = np.array([rrf_scores[idx] for idx in candidate_indices])
    top_indices = candidate_indices[np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = scores[np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return res.to_dict("records")

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # RRF scoring
    ranks = {}
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    sorted_bm25 = np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_indices])[::-1]
    for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices[sorted_bm25]):
        ranks[idx] = ranks.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + i)
        
    # Semantic Ranks
    for i, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        if idx in ranks:
            ranks[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + i)
            
    # Genre and Popularity Signals
    subset = df.iloc[all_indices]
    pop = np.log1p(subset['vote_count'])
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    genre_bonus = np.zeros(len(all_indices))
    query_genres = [t for t in tokens if t in ['action', 'comedy', 'drama', 'thriller', 'horror', 'sci-fi', 'romance', 'animation', 'fantasy']]
    if query_genres:
        for i, genres in enumerate(subset['genres'].str.lower()):
            if any(g in genres for g in query_genres):
                genre_bonus[i] = 0.2
    
    final_scores = np.array([ranks.get(i, 0.0) for i in all_indices]) + (0.1 * pop_norm) + genre_bonus
    
    res = subset.copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -250)[-250:]
    
    # Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 250)
    
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Scoring features
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    c_bm25 = (c_bm25 - c_bm25.min()) / (c_bm25.max() - c_bm25.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Normalized Semantic score
    dists_map = {idx: dist for idx, dist in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    c_semantic = np.array([dists_map.get(i, 10.0) for i in candidate_indices])
    c_semantic = 1.0 - (c_semantic - c_semantic.min()) / (c_semantic.max() - c_semantic.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre signal: binary match
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower().values
    genre_match = np.array([1.0 if any(g in genre for g in tokens) else 0.0 for genre in genres])
    
    # Title boost
    titles = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['title'].str.lower().values
    title_match = np.array([1.0 if any(t in title for t in tokens) else 0.0 for title in titles])
    
    # Final Score: Hybrid Ensemble
    final_scores = (0.35 * c_bm25) + (0.45 * c_semantic) + (0.1 * genre_match) + (0.1 * title_match)
    
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # Semantic Retrieval as the primary candidate pool
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    candidate_indices = idxs[0]
    
    # Prepare scores
    c_semantic = 1.0 / (1.0 + dists[0])
    
    # BM25 Reranking on the top pool
    c_bm25 = np.array([bm25.get_scores(tokens)[i] for i in candidate_indices])
    # Normalize BM25
    c_bm25 = (c_bm25 - c_bm25.min()) / (c_bm25.max() - c_bm25.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre boost based on token intersection
    c_genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_match = np.array([1.0 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 0.0 for g in c_genres])
    
    # Final score aggregation
    # Semantic (0.55) + BM25 (0.35) + Genre Boost (0.1)
    final_scores = (0.55 * c_semantic) + (0.35 * c_bm25) + (0.1 * genre_match)
    
    # Build results
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. Retrieve larger candidate pool
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # 2. Combine via RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion)
    rank_map = {}
    for r, idx in enumerate(top_bm25_idx[np.argsort(bm25_scores[top_bm25_idx])[::-1]]):
        rank_map[idx] = rank_map.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + r)
    for r, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        rank_map[idx] = rank_map.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    candidate_indices = np.array(list(rank_map.keys()))
    rrf_scores = np.array([rank_map[i] for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # 3. Features for Reranking
    subset = df.iloc[candidate_indices]
    
    # Genre-overlap boost: check if query tokens appear in genre strings
    genre_series = subset['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_boost = np.array([sum(token in g for token in tokens) for g in genre_series])

    pop_score = np.log1p(subset['vote_count'])

    # Final Score: combine RRF with genre alignment and popularity

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    bm25_indices = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-200:]
    dists, faiss_indices = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    # Candidate pool
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([bm25_indices, faiss_indices[0]]))
    
    # RRF scoring
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    # BM25 rank (inverted index)
    bm25_ranks = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(np.argsort(bm25_scores))}
    # FAISS rank
    faiss_ranks = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(np.argsort(dists[0])[::-1])}
    
    for idx in candidates:
        r1 = bm25_ranks.get(idx, 1000)
        r2 = faiss_ranks.get(idx, 1000)
        rrf_scores[idx] = 1.0 / (60 + r1) + 1.0 / (60 + r2)
        
    # Genre signal: binary match boost
    genres = df.iloc[candidates]['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_boost = np.array([1.2 if any(t in str(g) for t in tokens) else 1.0 for g in genres])
    
    # Popularity bias: log-normalized
    pop = np.log1p(df.iloc[candidates]['vote_count'])
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores[candidates] * genre_boost * (1.0 + 0.2 * pop_norm)
    
    results = df.iloc[candidates].copy()
    results['score'] = final_scores
    return results.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    # Retrieve top 200 candidates to reduce latency
    pool_size = 200
    
    # BM25
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(_bm25_tokenize(query))
    idx_bm25 = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-pool_size:]
    
    # Semantic
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_sem = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    idx_sem = idx_sem[0]
    
    # Union of indices
    candidate_indices = np.union1d(idx_bm25, idx_sem)
    
    # Pre-calculate scores for candidates
    scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # Normalize BM25
    b_min, b_max = bm25_scores[candidate_indices].min(), bm25_scores[candidate_indices].max()
    b_range = b_max - b_min + 1e-9
    scores[candidate_indices] += 0.4 * (bm25_scores[candidate_indices] - b_min) / b_range
    
    # Normalize Semantic
    s_map = {idx: 1.0/(1.0+d) for idx, d in zip(idx_sem, dists[0])}
    s_vals = np.array([s_map.get(i, 0.0) for i in candidate_indices])
    scores[candidate_indices] += 0.6 * s_vals
    
    # Genre-affinity boost
    query_lower = query.lower()
    for idx in candidate_indices:
        genres = df.iloc[idx]['genres'].lower()
        if any(g in query_lower for g in genres.split(', ') if len(g) > 3):
            scores[idx] *= 1.2
            
    # Final sort
    top_indices = np.argsort(scores[candidate_indices])[-top_k:][::-1]
    return df.iloc[candidate_indices[top_indices]].to_dict("records")
description: Reduce candidate pool to 200 for faster latency while using a weighted BM25/Semantic fusion with genre-affinity bias to maintain recall.

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. Faster retrieval: keep candidate pool moderate
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # 2. Vectorized scoring for speed: avoid loops
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    
    # Map faiss distances to indices efficiently
    idx_map = {idx: dists[0][i] for i, idx in enumerate(idxs[0])}
    c_semantic = np.array([idx_map.get(i, 100.0) for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # 3. Simple popularity and genre bias using pre-indexed columns
    # vote_count/average are already in df
    pop = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'].values
    pop_norm = np.log1p(pop)
    
    # 4. Final rank-based fusion (RRF style)
    # BM25 is already a similarity score, dists are L2
    # Invert dists: smaller L2 is better
    c_semantic_score = 1.0 / (1.0 + c_semantic)
    
    # MinMax scaling on small subset
    def norm(x):
        return (x - x.min()) / (x.max() - x.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = 0.5 * norm(c_bm25) + 0.5 * c_semantic_score + 0.05 * norm(pop_norm)
    
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    
    # Semantic scoring: 1 / (1 + distance)
    idx_map = {idx: 1.0/(1.0+d) for idx, d in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}

    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower().values
    genre_match = np.array([1.5 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 1.0 for g in genres])
    
    # Final Score: Hybrid linear combination
    final_scores = (c_bm25 * 0.4) + (c_semantic * 0.6)
    final_scores *= genre_match
    
    # Construct result
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):

    # FAISS search

    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, k_pool)

    bm25_subset = bm25_scores[idxs[0]]

    genres = df['genres'].iloc[idxs[0]].values
    genre_match = np.array([1.0 if any(g in t for g in str(gen).lower().split()) else 0.0

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):

    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]

    # Normalize popularity

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):

    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25 = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -100)[-100:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 100)
    idxs = idxs[0]
    
    # Build RRF map
    rrf_scores = {}
    
    # BM25
    sorted_bm25 = np.argsort(bm25_scores[top_bm25])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(top_bm25[sorted_bm25]):
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Semantic
    for r, idx in enumerate(idxs):
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Genre boost for RRF
    res_indices = list(rrf_scores.keys())
    genres = df.iloc[res_indices]['genres'].str.lower()
    for i, idx in enumerate(res_indices):
        if any(g in query.lower() for g in genres.iloc[i].split(', ')):
            rrf_scores[idx] += 0.05
            
    # Final sort
    sorted_idx = sorted(rrf_scores.keys(), key=lambda x: rrf_scores[x], reverse=True)
    res = df.iloc[sorted_idx[:top_k]].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")

    genres_list = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower().tolist()

    return df.iloc[best_indices].to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. BM25 Retrieval: Faster slice then score
    bm25_raw = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_raw, -150)[-150:]
    
    # 2. Semantic Retrieval: Minimal index overhead
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    idxs = idxs[0]
    dists = dists[0]
    
    # 3. Fast Merge using Union
    candidate_indices = np.union1d(top_bm25_idx, idxs)
    
    # 4. Efficient Scoring: Vectorized operations on pre-sliced subset
    # Map semantic distances to [0,1]
    sem_scores = np.zeros_like(candidate_indices, dtype=np.float32)
    sem_map = {idx: 1.0 / (1.0 + d) for idx, d in zip(idxs, dists)}
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        sem_scores[i] = sem_map.get(idx, 0.0)
        
    bm25_scores = bm25_raw[candidate_indices]
    
    # Genre signal: Fast vector match
    subset_df = df.iloc[candidate_indices]
    genre_str = subset_df['genres'].values

    final_indices = candidate_indices[top_n]

    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 100)

    genre_match = np.array([1.0 if any(t in str(g).lower() for t in tokens) else 0.0 for g in genres])
    
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(df.iloc[idxs]['vote_count'].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.mean()) / (pop.std() + 1e-9)
    
    # Weighted ensemble - normalize features
    c_bm25 = (c_bm25 - c_bm25.mean()) / (c_bm25.std() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = (0.3 * c_bm25) + (0.5 * c_semantic) + (0.1 * genre_match) + (0.1 * pop)

    res = df.iloc[idxs].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    # Pre-calculate tokenized query for efficiency
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. Retrieval (Limit to 150 candidates to balance latency/recall)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    
    # 2. Combine and prepare scores
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Efficiently gather scores using numpy indexing
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    # Normalize BM25
    bm25_max = c_bm25.max()
    if bm25_max > 0:
        c_bm25 /= bm25_max
    
    # Vector score: Convert distances (L2) to similarity (lower is better, so 1/(1+dist))
    # Map back to full candidate_indices
    semantic_map = {idx: 1.0/(1.0+d) for idx, d in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    c_semantic = np.array([semantic_map.get(i, 0.0) for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # 3. Lightweight Genre Signal: check presence of query tokens in genre string
    genre_str = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].values
    genre_boost = np.array([0.15 if any(t in g.lower() for t in tokens) else 0.0 for g in genre_str])
    
    # 4. Final fusion
    final_scores = (0.4 * c_bm25) + (0.5 * c_semantic) + genre_boost
    
    # 5. Sorting and return
    # Get top_k indices from candidates
    top_indices = candidate_indices[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Feature Extraction
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    
    # Normalize BM25
    b_min, b_max = c_bm25.min(), c_bm25.max()
    c_bm25 = (c_bm25 - b_min) / (b_max - b_min + 1e-9)
    
    # Semantic scores (1 - L2/max_dist)
    c_semantic = np.zeros(len(candidate_indices))
    for i, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        mask = candidate_indices == idx
        if np.any(mask):
            c_semantic[mask] = 1.0 - (dists[0][i] / 50.0)
            
    # Genre signal: binary check
    q_genres = [t for t in tokens if t in ['action', 'adventure', 'animation', 'comedy', 'crime', 'documentary', 'drama', 'family', 'fantasy', 'history', 'horror', 'music', 'mystery', 'romance', 'science fiction', 'thriller', 'war', 'western']]
    if q_genres:
        c_genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower().values
        genre_match = np.array([1.5 if any(g in str(g_row) for g in q_genres) else 1.0 for g_row in c_genres])
    else:
        genre_match = 1.0
        
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'].values)
    pop = 1.0 + (pop / (pop.max() + 1e-9))
    
    # Scoring
    final_scores = (c_bm25 * 0.4) + (c_semantic * 0.4) + (genre_match * 0.1) + (pop * 0.1)
    
    # Sort and return
    top_indices = candidate_indices[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Efficient BM25
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Efficient Semantic
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    
    # Candidate pool: top 150 from semantic + top 150 from BM25
    top_bm25 = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Scored features
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidates]
    c_bm25 /= (c_bm25.max() + 1e-9)
    
    c_semantic = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    for i, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        pos = np.where(candidates == idx)[0]
        if pos.size > 0:
            c_semantic[pos[0]] = 1.0 - (dists[0][i] / 100.0)
            
    # Metadata signals
    pop = np.log1p(df.iloc[candidates]['vote_count'].values)
    pop /= (pop.max() + 1e-9)
    
    # Simple weighted score
    scores = (0.4 * c_bm25) + (0.4 * c_semantic) + (0.2 * pop)
    
    # Efficient sort
    top_indices = candidates[np.argpartition(scores, -top_k)[-top_k:]]
    result_df = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    result_df['score'] = scores[np.searchsorted(candidates, top_indices)]
    
    return result_df.sort_values("score", ascending=False).to_dict("records")

    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    
    # Candidate pool
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Normalized scores
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    bm25_min, bm25_max = c_bm25.min(), c_bm25.max()
    c_bm25 = (c_bm25 - bm25_min) / (bm25_max - bm25_min + 1e-9)
    
    idx_map = {idx: 1.0/(1.0+d) for idx, d in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    c_semantic = np.array([idx_map.get(i, 0.0) for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # Genre boost using simple overlap
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].values
    g_match = np.array([sum(1.0 for t in tokens if t in g.lower()) for g in genres])
    g_match = (g_match - g_match.min()) / (g_match.max() - g_match.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Weighted fusion
    final_scores = (0.4 * c_bm25) + (0.5 * c_semantic) + (0.1 * g_match)

    res = df.iloc[top_idx].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores[np.argsort(-final_scores)[:top_k]]
    return res.to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    
    # 2. RRF Scores
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(np.argsort(-bm25_scores[all_indices])):
        rrf_scores[all_indices[idx]] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # 3. Genre + Popularity Boost
    # Binary genre match and log-scale vote boost
    genres = df['genres'].values
    vote_boost = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    vote_boost = vote_boost / (np.max(vote_boost) + 1e-9)
    
    genre_mask = np.array([1.1 if any(g in tokens for g in _bm25_tokenize(genre)) else 1.0 for genre in genres])
    final_scores = rrf_scores * genre_mask * (1.0 + 0.1 * vote_boost)
    
    # 4. Return Top K
    top_indices = np.argpartition(final_scores, -top_k)[-top_k:]
    top_indices = top_indices[np.argsort(-final_scores[top_indices])]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")
description: implement balanced RRF with popularity-weighted genre boost to improve rank stability and recall

    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]

    semantic_scores = np.zeros(len(candidate_indices))
    map_idx = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(faiss_idxs[0])}
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        if idx in map_idx:
            semantic_scores[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + dists[0][map_idx[idx]])
            
    # Normalize and combine
    c_bm25 = (c_bm25 - c_bm25.min()) / (c_bm25.max() - c_bm25.min() + 1e-9)
    semantic_scores = (semantic_scores - semantic_scores.min()) / (semantic_scores.max() - semantic_scores.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre boost: vector-based lookup
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_boost = np.array([0.2 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 0.0 for g in genres])
    
    final_scores = (0.4 * c_bm25) + (0.4 * semantic_scores) + (0.2 * genre_boost)
    
    # Result selection
    top_indices = candidate_indices[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Efficient retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -100)[-100:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 100)
    
    # Union indices
    unique_idx = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Pre-fetch columns to avoid dataframe lookups inside loop
    b_scores = bm25_scores[unique_idx]
    
    # Map vector distances
    v_scores = np.zeros_like(b_scores)
    dist_map = dict(zip(idxs[0], dists[0]))
    for i, idx in enumerate(unique_idx):
        if idx in dist_map:
            v_scores[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map[idx])
            
    # Normalize BM25
    b_max = b_scores.max()
    if b_max > 0:
        b_scores /= b_max
        
    # Final scoring: 0.6 semantic, 0.4 lexical
    final_scores = (0.6 * v_scores) + (0.4 * b_scores)
    
    # Get top_k
    top_n = np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    res_idx = unique_idx[top_n]
    
    return df.iloc[res_idx].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    # Pre-process tokens for BM25 and genre boosting
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Semantic search (FAISS) - single call
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # BM25 search
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Get top candidates from BM25 to complement FAISS
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    
    # Combine candidate pools
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([idxs[0], top_bm25_idx]))
    
    # Scoring - Extract scores once
    s_bm25 = bm25_scores[all_indices]
    s_faiss = np.zeros(len(all_indices))
    
    # Map faiss dists to candidates
    f_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices):
        if idx in f_map:
            s_faiss[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + f_map[idx])
            
    # Normalize BM25
    bm_min, bm_max = s_bm25.min(), s_bm25.max()
    s_bm25 = (s_bm25 - bm_min) / (bm_max - bm_min + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre boost: check if query tokens appear in genres
    genres = df.iloc[all_indices]['genres'].values
    genre_boost = np.array([0.15 if any(t in g.lower() for t in tokens) else 0.0 for g in genres])
    
    # Popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df.iloc[all_indices]['vote_count'].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.mean()) / (pop.std() + 1e-9) * 0.05
    
    # Hybrid score
    scores = (0.5 * s_faiss) + (0.4 * s_bm25) + genre_boost + pop
    
    # Sort and return
    top_idx = all_indices[np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_idx].to_dict("records")
description: Optimized latency by replacing multi-step fusion with a single-pass RRF-like score on a consolidated 300-candidate pool, leveraging local numpy indexing to minimize dataframe overhead.

    # Sort and return

    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
import re
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    
    # Candidate union
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Fast Scoring
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidates]
    c_semantic = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    idx_map = {idx: dist for idx, dist in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        if idx in idx_map:
            c_semantic[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + idx_map[idx])
            
    # Normalize
    bm25_norm = (c_bm25 - c_bm25.min()) / (c_bm25.max() - c_bm25.min() + 1e-9)
    sem_norm = (c_semantic - c_semantic.min()) / (c_semantic.max() - c_semantic.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Weighted ensemble
    scores = 0.4 * bm25_norm + 0.6 * sem_norm
    
    # Sort
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # 1. Faster BM25: limit tokenization and get scores
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # 2. Faster Semantic: single encode
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    
    # 3. Candidate selection: Union top indices
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    candidate_indices = np.union1d(top_bm25_idx, idxs[0])
    
    # 4. Scoring using NumPy vectorized ops
    # BM25 contribution
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    
    # Semantic contribution
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    c_semantic = np.array([dist_map.get(i, 10.0) for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # Genre boost: vector matching
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].values
    c_genres = np.array([sum(1.0 for token in tokens if token in str(g).lower()) for g in genres])
    
    # Popularity boost
    pop = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['vote_count'].values
    c_pop = np.log1p(pop)
    
    # Combined score
    # We want low dists to be high scores, so we use -dist
    # Normalize components to standard scale roughly
    final_scores = (0.4 * (c_bm25 / (np.max(c_bm25) + 1e-9))) + \
                   (0.4 * (1.0 / (1.0 + c_semantic))) + \
                   (0.1 * (c_genres / (np.max(c_genres) + 1e-9 + 1))) + \
                   (0.1 * (c_pop / (np.max(c_pop) + 1e-9)))
    
    # Return top K
    res = df.iloc[candidate_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores
    return res.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(top_k).to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Efficient retrieval with pooled candidates
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -150)[-150:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 150)
    
    # Combined indices
    c_idx = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Optimized scoring: BM25 (scaled) + Vector (inverse dist)
    b_scores = bm25_scores[c_idx]
    b_scores = (b_scores - b_scores.min()) / (b_scores.ptp() + 1e-9)
    
    v_scores = np.zeros(len(c_idx))
    lookup = {idx: 1.0 / (1.0 + d) for idx, d in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    for i, idx in enumerate(c_idx):
        v_scores[i] = lookup.get(idx, 0.0)
    
    # Apply genre boost only to candidates to save time
    genres = df.iloc[c_idx]['genres'].str.lower().values
    g_boost = np.array([0.1 if any(t in g for t in tokens) else 0.0 for g in genres])
    
    # Final blend
    scores = 0.45 * b_scores + 0.55 * v_scores + g_boost
    
    # Extract top_k
    top_n = np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    return df.iloc[c_idx].iloc[top_n].to_dict("records")
description: optimized latency by streamlining hybrid scoring and utilizing vectorized NumPy operations on a unified candidate pool

    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    
    # Vector Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    # Merge candidates
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Normalize BM25
    s_b = bm25_scores[candidates]
    s_b_min, s_b_max = s_b.min(), s_b.max()
    s_b = (s_b - s_b_min) / (s_b_max - s_b_min + 1e-9)
    
    # Vector Distance to Score
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_s = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 5.0)) for i in candidates])
    
    # Popularity signal
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.mean()) / (pop.std() + 1e-9)
    
    # Weighted fusion
    final_scores = (0.4 * s_b) + (0.5 * s_s) + (0.1 * pop)
    
    # Rank and slice
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return res.to_dict("records")

    # Localized scoring

    s_b = (s_b - s_b.min()) / (s_b.max() - s_b.min() + 1e-9)

    s_s = np.array([dist_map.get(i, 1.0) for i in candidates])

    genres = df['genres'].iloc[candidates].values

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # Candidate selection
    bm25_top_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([bm25_top_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Scoring
    # Use numpy directly for efficiency
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidate_indices]
    c_bm25 = (c_bm25 - c_bm25.min()) / (c_bm25.max() - c_bm25.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Semantic similarity: map FAISS results
    idx_map = {idx: 1.0/(1.0+d) for idx, d in zip(idxs[0], dists[0])}
    c_semantic = np.array([idx_map.get(i, 0.0) for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # Extract needed columns as arrays to avoid dataframe overhead
    vote_counts = df['vote_count'].values[candidate_indices]
    
    # Final score: balanced hybrid
    final_scores = (0.5 * c_bm25) + (0.5 * c_semantic)
    
    # Get top_k indices
    top_indices_local = np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    top_indices = candidate_indices[top_indices_local]
    
    # Convert to dict at the very end
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Increase pool size to 400 for better candidate recall
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -400)[-400:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 400)
    
    # RRF mapping
    rrf_scores = {}
    
    # BM25 RRF
    for rank, i in enumerate(idx_b):
        rrf_scores[i] = rrf_scores.get(i, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for rank, i in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[i] = rrf_scores.get(i, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    candidate_indices = np.array(list(rrf_scores.keys()))
    scores = np.array([rrf_scores[i] for i in candidate_indices])
    
    # Genre boost: identify genres in query
    query_lower = query.lower()
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(candidate_indices))
    for idx, i in enumerate(candidate_indices):
        movie_genres = str(df['genres'].iloc[i]).lower()
        if any(g in query_lower for g in movie_genres.split('|')):
            genre_boost[idx] = 0.05
            
    # Popularity boost: log-scaled vote count
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidate_indices].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.mean()) / (pop.std() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = scores + genre_boost + (0.01 * pop)
    
    # Slice top results
    top_n = min(top_k, len(candidate_indices))
    partition = np.argpartition(final_scores, -top_n)[-top_n:]
    top_indices = candidate_indices[partition[np.argsort(final_scores[partition])[::-1]]]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores[partition[np.argsort(final_scores[partition])[::-1]]]
    return res.to_dict("records")
description: Use balanced RRF with popularity-weighted genre boost to improve retrieval recall and ranking stability.

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Increase pool size to 400 to improve recall coverage for long-tail/semantic queries
    pool_size = 400
    
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Merge candidates
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Extract candidate signals
    bm25_vals = bm25_scores[candidates]
    # Map vector distances (L2) to similarity
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    semantic_vals = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 5.0)) for i in candidates])
    
    # Genre boost: count keyword overlap in genre string
    genre_str = df['genres'].iloc[candidates].values
    genre_boost = np.array([sum(1 for t in tokens if t in g.lower()) for g in genre_str])
    
    # Normalize scores to 0-1 range
    def norm(x):
        return (x - x.min()) / (x.max() - x.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = 0.35 * norm(bm25_vals) + 0.5 * norm(semantic_vals) + 0.15 * norm(genre_boost)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return res.to_dict("records")

    s_b = (s_b - s_b.min()) / (s_b.max() - s_b.min() + 1e-9)
    
    dist_map = dict(zip(idx_s[0], dists[0]))
    s_s = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, np.max(dists))) for i in candidates])
    s_s = (s_s - s_s.min()) / (s_s.max() - s_s.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Use genre metadata as a lightweight categorical bias
    genre_col = df['genres'].iloc[candidates].values
    genre_boost = np.array([0.1 if any(t in str(g).lower() for t in tokens) else 0.0 for g in genre_col])
    
    # Combine signals: simple weighted fusion is cost-efficient and stable
    final_scores = (0.5 * s_b) + (0.5 * s_s) + genre_boost
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    res['score'] = final_scores[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return res.to_dict("records")

import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # Get top 300 candidates from BM25 and Semantic
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Get genre masks
    genres = df['genres'].iloc[candidates].values
    genre_match = np.array([1.2 if any(g.lower() in query.lower() for g in genre.split(", ")) else 1.0 for genre in genres])
    
    # Normalize scores
    s_b = bm25_scores[candidates]
    s_b = (s_b - s_b.min()) / (s_b.max() - s_b.min() + 1e-9)
    
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_s = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 5.0)) for i in candidates])
    
    # Popularity adjustment
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = (s_b * 0.4 + s_s * 0.4) * genre_match + (pop_norm * 0.2)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    # Use top 200 BM25 and 200 Semantic candidates
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Extract scores for candidate subset
    s_b = bm25_scores[candidates]
    s_b = (s_b - s_b.min()) / (s_b.max() - s_b.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Map vector distances
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_s = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 5.0)) for i in candidates])
    
    # Genre boost: compute overlap between query tokens and genre strings
    genre_vals = df['genres'].iloc[candidates].values
    genre_boost = np.array([sum(1 for t in tokens if t in g.lower()) for g in genre_vals])
    genre_boost = genre_boost / (genre_boost.max() + 1e-9)

    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
