    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Increase pool size slightly to improve recall for long-tail, then rerank efficiently
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Merge candidates
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Normalize BM25
    s_b = bm25_scores[candidates]
    s_b = (s_b - s_b.min()) / (s_b.max() - s_b.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Normalize Semantic distances (convert to similarity)
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_s = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 1.0)) for i in candidates])
    s_s = (s_s - s_s.min()) / (s_s.max() - s_s.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Incorporate vote popularity with log dampening

import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Increase pool size to 400 to improve recall for long-tail queries
    pool_size = 400
    
    # BM25 candidates
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    # Semantic candidates
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Union of indices
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # RRF calculation
    # rank 0 is best
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 contribution
    b_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidates])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(candidates[b_ranks]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60.0 + r)
        
    # Semantic contribution
    s_ranks = np.argsort(dists[0])
    for r, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0][s_ranks]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60.0 + r)
    
    # Popularity boost to resolve ties and rank preference
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores + (0.1 * pop_norm)
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    # Top K
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Union of candidates
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # BM25 scores for candidates
    s_b = bm25_scores[candidates]
    # Min-max normalization for BM25
    s_b_min, s_b_max = s_b.min(), s_b.max()
    s_b = (s_b - s_b_min) / (s_b_max - s_b_min + 1e-9)
    
    # Vector scores: Map distance to similarity [0, 1]
    # Using 1/(1+d) for similarity
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_s = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 5.0)) for i in candidates])

    genre_vals = df['genres'].iloc[candidates].values
    genre_boost = np.array([1.05 if any(t in str(g).lower() for t in tokens) else 1.0 for g in genre_vals])
    
    # Popularity boost: Log scale
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop = pop / (pop.max() + 1e-9)
    
    # Combined score
    final_scores = (0.4 * s_b) + (0.4 * s_s) + (0.1 * genre_boost) + (0.1 * pop)
    
    # Get top_k indices
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 250)
    
    # RRF setup
    pool = np.unique(np.concatenate([np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -250)[-250:], idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Calculate ranks
    bm25_ranks = np.full(len(df), 500)
    bm25_ranks[pool] = np.argsort(np.argsort(-bm25_scores[pool]))
    
    semantic_ranks = np.full(len(df), 500)
    semantic_ranks[idx_s[0]] = np.arange(len(idx_s[0]))
    
    # RRF score
    rrf_scores = (1.0 / (60 + bm25_ranks)) + (1.0 / (60 + semantic_ranks))
    
    # Genre boost: intersection of query tokens with genres
    query_genres = [t for t in tokens if any(t in g.lower() for g in df['genres'])]
    if query_genres:
        genre_mask = df['genres'].apply(lambda x: sum(t in x.lower() for t in query_genres))
        rrf_scores += (genre_mask.values * 0.05)
    
    # Popularity bias
    pop_score = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    pop_score /= (pop_score.max() + 1e-9)
    final_scores = rrf_scores + (0.02 * pop_score)
    
    top_indices = np.argpartition(final_scores[pool], -top_k)[-top_k:]
    top_indices = pool[top_indices[np.argsort(final_scores[pool[top_indices]])[::-1]]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Use union of candidates to maintain recall coverage
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Pre-fetch candidate metrics
    c_bm25 = bm25_scores[candidates]
    
    # Map vector distances
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    c_semantic = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 1.0)) for i in candidates])
    
    # Genre-boost using simple overlap if query contains genre terms
    genre_mask = df['genres'].iloc[candidates].str.lower()
    c_genre = np.array([sum(1 for t in tokens if t in g) for g in genre_mask], dtype=np.float32)
    
    # Normalization
    c_bm25 = (c_bm25 - c_bm25.min()) / (c_bm25.max() - c_bm25.min() + 1e-9)
    c_semantic = (c_semantic - c_semantic.min()) / (c_semantic.max() - c_semantic.min() + 1e-9)
    c_genre = (c_genre - c_genre.min()) / (c_genre.max() - c_genre.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Weighted fusion: prioritize semantic/BM25, supplement with genre and popularity
    final_scores = (0.4 * c_bm25) + (0.4 * c_semantic) + (0.1 * c_genre) + (0.1 * pop)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Increase pool size to capture more candidates for reranking
    pool_size = 500
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)

    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))

    genre_match = np.array([1.2 if any(g.lower() in query_lower for g in str(row).split(', ')) else 1.0

    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)

    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]

    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)

    k = 60

    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]

    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df), dtype="float32")
    
    # Rank BM25
    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores[top_bm25_idx])[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(top_bm25_idx):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (k + rank)
        
    # Rank Semantic
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (k + rank)
        
    # Genre boost: identify genres in query
    query_lower = query.lower()
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(df), dtype="float32")
    for g in ["action", "adventure", "animation", "comedy", "crime", "documentary", "drama", "family", "fantasy", "history", "horror", "music", "mystery", "romance", "science fiction", "thriller", "war", "western"]:
        if g in query_lower:
            genre_boost += df['genres'].str.contains(g, case=False, na=False).values.astype("float32") * 0.1
            
    final_scores = rrf_scores + genre_boost
    
    top_indices = np.argpartition(final_scores, -top_k)[-top_k:]

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    # Vector retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Merge candidates
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # RRF scoring
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # Add BM25 RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_b[np.argsort(bm25_scores[idx_b])][::-1]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Add Vector RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Apply genre-intersection boost
    query_genres = [g.strip().lower() for g in re.split(r',| ', query.lower()) if len(g) > 3]
    if query_genres:
        for idx in all_indices:
            movie_genres = df.iloc[idx]['genres'].lower()
            matches = sum(1 for g in query_genres if g in movie_genres)
            if matches > 0:
                rrf_scores[idx] *= (1.0 + 0.5 * matches)
                
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[all_indices].values)
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    rrf_scores[all_indices] += 0.1 * pop_norm
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(rrf_scores[all_indices])[-top_k:][::-1]
    res = df.iloc[all_indices[top_indices]].copy()
    
    return res.to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # Use direct array operations to avoid dataframe overhead
    vote_counts = df['vote_count'].values
    vote_boost = np.log1p(vote_counts) / np.log1p(vote_counts.max())
    
    # Calculate hybrid score on indices directly
    final_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # Scale BM25 scores
    s_b = bm25_scores / (bm25_scores.max() + 1e-9)
    
    # Semantic scores (using inverted distances)
    s_s = np.zeros(len(df))
    for i, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        s_s[idx] = 1.0 / (1.0 + dists[0][i])
    s_s /= (s_s.max() + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre-based boost: check if query tokens appear in genres
    # This is a lightweight way to prioritize genre alignment
    genre_match = np.zeros(len(df))
    for token in tokens:
        genre_match += df['genres'].str.contains(token, case=False, na=False).values.astype(float)
    
    # Combine signals
    final_scores = (0.4 * s_b) + (0.4 * s_s) + (0.1 * vote_boost) + (0.1 * (genre_match / (genre_match.max() + 1e-9)))
    
    top_indices = np.argpartition(final_scores, -top_k)[-top_k:]
    top_indices = top_indices[np.argsort(final_scores[top_indices])[::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 300
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # RRF dictionary for rank fusion
    rrf_scores = {}
    
    # BM25 ranks
    bm25_sorted = idx_b[np.argsort(bm25_scores[idx_b])][::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(bm25_sorted):
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Vector ranks
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Genre boost: identify genres in query
    query_lower = query.lower()
    for idx in rrf_scores:
        genre_str = str(df['genres'].iloc[idx]).lower()
        # Simple heuristic: check if any genre name is in the query
        if any(g.strip() in query_lower for g in genre_str.split(',')):
            rrf_scores[idx] *= 1.2
            
    # Add minor popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[list(rrf_scores.keys())].values)
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    for i, idx in enumerate(rrf_scores.keys()):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 0.05 * pop_norm[i]
        
    # Get top_k
    sorted_idx = sorted(rrf_scores, key=rrf_scores.get, reverse=True)[:top_k]
    
    res = df.iloc[sorted_idx].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 200)

    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # BM25 scores normalized
    s_b = bm25_scores[candidates]
    s_b = (s_b - s_b.min()) / (s_b.max() - s_b.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Vector scores normalized from L2 distance
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_s = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 1.0)) for i in candidates])
    s_s = (s_s - s_s.min()) / (s_s.max() - s_s.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre boost: check if any query tokens appear in genre strings
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        genres = df['genres'].iloc[idx].lower()
        for token in tokens:
            if token in genres:

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # Use 300 as a combined pool
    top_bm25 = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Map vector distances
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    
    # Fast access to metadata using numpy
    votes = df['vote_count'].values[candidates]
    # Simple genre-affinity: check if any query term appears in genres
    genre_str = df['genres'].values[candidates]
    genre_boost = np.array([1.1 if any(t in g.lower() for t in tokens) else 1.0 for g in genre_str])
    
    # RRF scoring
    b_scores = bm25_scores[candidates]
    s_scores = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 5.0)) for i in candidates])
    
    # Rank them
    rank_b = np.argsort(np.argsort(b_scores))
    rank_s = np.argsort(np.argsort(s_scores))
    
    # Combined score with genre and popularity boost
    pop_boost = np.log1p(votes)
    final_scores = (rank_b + rank_s) * genre_boost + (0.01 * pop_boost)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Use pool of 300 to maintain recall while controlling cost/latency
    pool_size = 300
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Vectorized score normalization
    s_b = bm25_scores[candidates]
    b_min, b_max = s_b.min(), s_b.max()
    s_b = (s_b - b_min) / (b_max - b_min + 1e-9)
    
    # Map vector distances (lower is better, convert to affinity)
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_s = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 5.0)) for i in candidates])
    
    # Popularity boost from vote_count
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Weighted ensemble: bias towards lexical/semantic intersection
    final_scores = (0.4 * s_b) + (0.4 * s_s) + (0.2 * pop)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # RRF Scoring with Genre Bias
    rrf_score = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 Rank
    bm25_sort = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidates])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(candidates[bm25_sort]):
        rrf_score[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Semantic Rank
    sem_sort = np.argsort(dists[0])
    for r, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_score[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Genre-overlap boost: Simple bitwise check for relevant genre tokens in query
    genre_tokens = [g.lower() for g in set(", ".join(df['genres']).split(", "))]
    query_genres = [t for t in tokens if t in genre_tokens]
    
    if query_genres:
        genre_matches = df['genres'].str.lower().apply(lambda x: sum(t in x for t in query_genres))
        rrf_score += (genre_matches.values * 0.05)
    
    # Popularity boost
    rrf_score += np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values) * 0.001

    res = df.iloc[candidates[top_indices]].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Increase pool size to 400 for better recall
    pool_size = 400
    
    # Get top BM25 and Semantic candidates
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Merge candidates and map to RRF ranks
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(all_indices))
    
    # Map index to position for RRF
    bm25_map = {idx: rank for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_b[np.argsort(bm25_scores[idx_b])[::-1]])}
    dist_map = {idx: rank for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0])}
    
    for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices):
        score_b = 1.0 / (60 + bm25_map.get(idx, pool_size))
        score_s = 1.0 / (60 + dist_map.get(idx, pool_size))

        movie_genres = str(df['genres'].iloc[idx]).lower()

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 300
    b_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, s_idx = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    s_idx = s_idx[0]
    
    all_candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([b_idx, s_idx]))
    
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(all_candidates))
    idx_map = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(all_candidates)}
    
    # RRF for BM25
    sorted_b = np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_candidates])[::-1]
    for rank, i in enumerate(sorted_b):
        rrf_scores[i] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # RRF for Semantic
    for rank, idx in enumerate(s_idx):
        if idx in idx_map:
            rrf_scores[idx_map[idx]] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
            
    # Genre boost: simple overlap
    q_genres = [g.strip().lower() for g in re.split(r'[ ,|]', query.lower()) if len(g) > 2]
    if q_genres:
        for i, idx in enumerate(all_candidates):
            g_str = str(df['genres'].iloc[idx]).lower()
            matches = sum(1 for g in q_genres if g in g_str)
            rrf_scores[i] *= (1.0 + 0.2 * matches)
            
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[all_candidates].values)
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    rrf_scores += 0.05 * pop_norm
    
    top_indices = all_candidates[np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # RRF params
    k = 60
    
    pool_size = 300
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    # Create unified candidate set
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Calculate RRF scores
    def get_rrf(indices, scores):
        rrf = np.zeros(len(df))
        # Rank by score (descending)
        sorted_idx = indices[np.argsort(scores[indices])[::-1]]
        for r, idx in enumerate(sorted_idx):
            rrf[idx] += 1.0 / (k + r)
        return rrf

    rrf_b = get_rrf(np.arange(len(df)), bm25_scores)
    
    # Semantic ranks
    rrf_s = np.zeros(len(df))
    for r, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_s[idx] += 1.0 / (k + r)
        
    final_scores = rrf_b + rrf_s
    
    # Genre boost: simple mask if query tokens match genre
    # Get all unique genres from df if not already cached
    query_lower = query.lower()
    for genre in ["action", "adventure", "animation", "comedy", "crime", "documentary", "drama", "family", "fantasy", "history", "horror", "music", "mystery", "romance", "science fiction", "thriller", "war", "western"]:
        if genre in query_lower:
            mask = df['genres'].str.contains(genre, case=False, na=False).values
            final_scores[mask] += 0.2
            
    # Popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    final_scores += 0.05 * (pop / np.max(pop + 1e-9))
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Increase initial candidate pool for better recall
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # BM25 scores for candidates
    s_b = bm25_scores[candidates]
    s_b = (s_b - s_b.min()) / (s_b.max() - s_b.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Semantic scores for candidates (convert L2 distance to similarity)
    dist_map = {int(idx): d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_s = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(int(i), 5.0)) for i in candidates])
    s_s = (s_s - s_s.min()) / (s_s.max() - s_s.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre affinity: check if query words appear in genres
    genre_str = df['genres'].iloc[candidates].values
    genre_boost = np.array([sum(1 for token in tokens if token in g.lower()) for g in genre_str])
    
    # Popularity normalization: use log1p for vote_count
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Combined score
    final_scores = (0.4 * s_b) + (0.4 * s_s) + (0.1 * genre_boost) + (0.1 * pop)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)

    s_b = (s_b - s_b.min()) / (s_b.max() - s_b.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Vector score normalization: convert L2 distance to [0,1]
    s_s = np.zeros_like(s_b)
    dist_map = dict(zip(idx_s[0], dists[0]))
    for i, idx in enumerate(all_idx):
        s_s[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(idx, 1.0))
    s_s = (s_s - s_s.min()) / (s_s.max() - s_s.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Popularity boost: log-scale, normalized to improve long-tail
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[all_idx].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Final fusion
    final_scores = (0.4 * s_b) + (0.5 * s_s) + (0.1 * pop)
    
    # Get top_k
    top_indices = all_idx[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 500
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)

    rrf_scores = {}

    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_b[np.argsort(bm25_scores[idx_b])[::-1]]):
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic contribution
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)

    candidate_ids = list(rrf_scores.keys())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):

    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # Use top 300 from BM25 and top 300 from index
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Calculate genre affinity (using simple intersection of query tokens in genres)

    genre_mask = np.zeros(len(candidates))

    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        if any(g in q_lower for g in df['genres'].iloc[idx].lower().split('|')):
            genre_mask[i] = 1.0
            
    # Combine BM25 and Negative L2 distance (higher is better)
    # Use raw scores to save compute, add popularity and genre boost
    bm25_part = bm25_scores[candidates]
    dist_part = -dists[0][np.searchsorted(idx_s[0], candidates)]
    pop_part = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # RRF parameters
    k = 60
    
    # BM25 candidates
    idx_b = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-300:]
    
    # Create RRF map
    rrf_scores = {}
    
    # Add BM25 ranks
    for rank, i in enumerate(idx_b[::-1]):
        rrf_scores[i] = rrf_scores.get(i, 0) + 1 / (k + rank)
        
    # Add Semantic ranks
    for rank, i in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[i] = rrf_scores.get(i, 0) + 1 / (k + rank)
        
    # Apply genre boost
    candidate_ids = np.array(list(rrf_scores.keys()))
    candidate_scores = np.array(list(rrf_scores.values()))
    
    # Genre signal: simple binary boost for keywords present in query
    query_genres = [g for g in ["action", "adventure", "animation", "comedy", "crime", "documentary", "drama", "family", "fantasy", "history", "horror", "music", "mystery", "romance", "science fiction", "thriller", "war", "western"] if g in query.lower()]
    if query_genres:
        genre_mask = df['genres'].iloc[candidate_ids].apply(lambda x: any(g in x.lower() for g in query_genres))
        candidate_scores[genre_mask] *= 1.2
        
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidate_ids].values)
    candidate_scores *= (1.0 + 0.05 * (pop / np.max(pop + 1e-9)))
    
    top_indices = candidate_ids[np.argsort(candidate_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")

    idx_b = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-300:]
    all_indices = np.union1d(idx_b, idx_s[0])

    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))

    bm25_sorted = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(bm25_sorted[:300]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (k_rrf + rank)
        
    # FAISS ranks
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (k_rrf + rank)
        
    # Popularity and Genre boost
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    avg = df['vote_average'].values
    
    # Genre boost: identify genres in query

    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # RRF params
    k = 60
    pool_size = 300
    
    # BM25 Top candidates
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]

    query_lower = query.lower()
    genre_mask = np.zeros(len(df), dtype=np.float32)
    for g in ["action", "comedy", "drama", "horror", "sci-fi", "thriller", "romance", "mystery"]:
        if g in query_lower:
            genre_mask += df['genres'].str.contains(g, case=False).values.astype(np.float32)
            
    # Combine candidate pools
    all_candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Compute RRF scores
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df), dtype=np.float32)
    
    # BM25 contribution
    sort_b = np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_candidates])[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(all_candidates[sort_b]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (k + rank)
        
    # Semantic contribution
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (k + rank)
        
    # Apply genre boost and popularity bias
    popularity = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    final_scores = rrf_scores * (1.0 + 0.2 * genre_mask) + (0.01 * popularity)
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(final_scores[all_candidates])[-top_k:][::-1]
    res = df.iloc[all_candidates[top_indices]].copy()
    
    return res.to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    # Get top BM25 candidates
    top_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    
    # Unique candidate union
    candidates = np.union1d(top_b, idx_s[0])
    
    # RRF scoring
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    
    # BM25 ranks (descending order)
    b_scores_subset = bm25_scores[candidates]
    b_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(-b_scores_subset))
    rrf_scores += 1.0 / (60.0 + b_ranks)
    
    # Vector ranks
    s_ranks = np.full(len(candidates), 200)
    for i, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        pos = np.where(candidates == idx)[0]
        if len(pos) > 0:
            s_ranks[pos[0]] = i
    rrf_scores += 1.0 / (60.0 + s_ranks)
    
    # Genre affinity: simple match count
    query_lower = query.lower()
    genre_bonus = np.array([
        0.1 if any(g.lower() in query_lower for g in str(df['genres'].iloc[i]).split(', ')) else 0.0
        for i in candidates
    ])
    
    # Final ranking
    final_scores = rrf_scores + genre_bonus
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop = pop / (pop.max() + 1e-9)

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    bm25_dict = {i: r for r, i in enumerate(np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_indices])[::-1])}
    faiss_dict = {i: r for r, i in enumerate(idx_s[0])}
    
    genres = df['genres'].iloc[all_indices].values
    genre_boost = np.array([1.5 if any(g.lower() in query.lower() for g in genre.split(", ")) else 1.0 for genre in genres])
    
    scores = np.zeros(len(all_indices))
    for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices):
        r_b = bm25_dict.get(idx, 300)
        r_s = faiss_dict.get(idx, 300)
        rrf = (1.0 / (60 + r_b)) + (1.0 / (60 + r_s))
        scores[i] = rrf * genre_boost[i]
        
    top_indices = all_indices[np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 300
    
    # BM25 candidates
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    # Semantic candidates
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Unique union of indices
    all_idx = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # RRF Ranks
    bm25_ranks = np.full(len(df), pool_size + 1, dtype=float)
    bm25_ranks[idx_b] = np.argsort(np.argsort(bm25_scores[idx_b]))[::-1] + 1
    
    sem_ranks = np.full(len(df), pool_size + 1, dtype=float)
    sem_ranks[idx_s[0]] = np.arange(1, pool_size + 1)
    
    # Calculate RRF score
    rrf_score = (1.0 / (60.0 + bm25_ranks)) + (1.0 / (60.0 + sem_ranks))
    
    # Genre affinity check: boost if tokens appear in genres
    query_tokens = set(tokens)
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(df))
    for i, row_genres in enumerate(df['genres']):
        if any(token in row_genres.lower() for token in query_tokens):
            genre_boost[i] = 0.05
            
    # Popularity bias
    pop_bias = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values) / np.log1p(df['vote_count'].max()) * 0.02
    
    final_scores = rrf_score + genre_boost + pop_bias
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(final_scores[all_idx])[::-1][:top_k]
    res = df.iloc[all_idx[top_indices]].copy()
    
    return res.to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Increase pool size to capture more recall, but keep processing efficient
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Prepare RRF-like rankings
    b_scores = bm25_scores[candidates]
    s_scores = np.full(len(candidates), 5.0)
    
    # Match vector search indices
    match = np.where(idx_s[0, :, None] == candidates)[1]
    s_scores[match] = dists[0, np.where(idx_s[0, :, None] == candidates)[0]]
    
    # Genre affinity: check if query tokens overlap with genres
    genre_match = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    for token in tokens:
        if len(token) > 3:
            genre_match += df['genres'].iloc[candidates].str.contains(token, case=False).values.astype(float)
            
    # Combine signals: RRF is too expensive, use normalized score fusion with genre boost
    s_norm = 1.0 / (1.0 + s_scores)
    b_norm = (b_scores - b_scores.min()) / (b_scores.max() - b_scores.min() + 1e-9)
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values) / np.log1p(df['vote_count'].max())
    
    final_scores = (0.4 * b_norm) + (0.4 * s_norm) + (0.1 * genre_match) + (0.1 * pop)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    tokens = re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())
    return tokens

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    # Retrieve candidates
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Expand search pool to improve recall for long-tail
    pool_size = 750
    top_bm25_idx = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # RRF Score aggregation
    scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    # BM25 Ranks
    ranked_bm25 = np.argsort(np.argsort(bm25_scores))
    scores += 1.0 / (60.0 + (pool_size - 1 - ranked_bm25))
    
    # Semantic Ranks
    for i, idx in enumerate(idxs[0]):
        scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60.0 + i)
        
    # Genre boost: identify genres in query
    df_genres = df['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_bonus = np.zeros(len(df))
    for genre in ["action", "adventure", "animation", "comedy", "crime", "documentary", 
                  "drama", "family", "fantasy", "history", "horror", "music", "mystery", 
                  "romance", "science fiction", "thriller", "war", "western"]:
        if genre in query.lower():
            genre_bonus += df_genres.str.contains(genre, na=False).astype(float)
    
    # Vote-count bias: log-normalized to favor well-regarded movies without drowning signal
    vote_boost = np.log1p(df['vote_count']) / np.log1p(df['vote_count'].max())
    
    # Combine signals
    final_scores = scores + (genre_bonus * 0.15) + (vote_boost * 0.05)
    
    # Select top candidates
    top_indices = np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 500
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    all_candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 rank contribution
    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(bm25_scores))
    rrf_scores[all_candidates] += 1.0 / (60.0 + (len(df) - bm25_ranks[all_candidates]))
    
    # Semantic rank contribution
    sem_ranks = np.full(len(df), pool_size + 1)
    sem_ranks[idx_s[0]] = np.arange(pool_size)
    rrf_scores[all_candidates] += 1.0 / (60.0 + sem_ranks[all_candidates])
    
    # Genre boost: identify genres in query
    query_lower = query.lower()
    genre_mask = df['genres'].apply(lambda g: any(word in query_lower for word in g.lower().split('|')))
    rrf_scores[genre_mask] *= 1.2
    
    # Popularity bias
    pop_boost = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].fillna(0).values) / np.log1p(df['vote_count'].max())
    final_scores = rrf_scores * (1.0 + 0.1 * pop_boost)
    
    top_indices = np.argpartition(final_scores, -top_k)[-top_k:]

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # Retrieval
    pool_size = 400
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Title-boosted BM25: identify candidates with title matches
    title_mask = df['title'].str.lower().apply(lambda x: any(t in x for t in tokens))
    bm25_scores[title_mask] *= 1.5
    
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    idx_s = idx_s[0]
    
    # Reciprocal Rank Fusion
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s]))
    
    def get_rrf(indices, scores, reverse=True):
        rank_map = {}
        sorted_idx = np.argsort(scores[indices])
        if reverse: sorted_idx = sorted_idx[::-1]
        for rank, idx in enumerate(indices[sorted_idx]):
            rank_map[idx] = 1.0 / (60.0 + rank)
        return rank_map

    rrf_b = get_rrf(idx_b, bm25_scores)
    rrf_s = {idx: 1.0 / (60.0 + rank) for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s)}
    
    final_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    for idx in all_indices:
        final_scores[idx] = rrf_b.get(idx, 0) + rrf_s.get(idx, 0)
        
        # Genre-affinity boost
        if hasattr(df, 'genres'):
            genre_str = str(df['genres'].iloc[idx]).lower()
            if any(t in genre_str for t in tokens):
                final_scores[idx] *= 1.2
    
    # Final ranking
    top_indices = np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    # Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    idx_s = idx_s[0]
    
    # Combine candidate pools
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s]))
    
    # RRF scoring
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(all_indices))
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    b_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_indices])[::-1]
    rrf_scores[b_ranks] += 1.0 / (60.0 + np.arange(len(all_indices)))
    
    # Semantic Ranks
    s_map = {idx: rank for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s)}
    s_ranks = np.array([s_map.get(i, 500) for i in all_indices])
    rrf_scores += 1.0 / (60.0 + s_ranks)
    
    # Genre-boosted Popularity
    # Boost by vote_count normalized log, plus genre match if available in query
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[all_indices].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Simple genre presence boost
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(all_indices))
    for genre in ["Action", "Comedy", "Drama", "Sci-Fi", "Horror", "Romance", "Thriller"]:
        if genre.lower() in query.lower():
            mask = df['genres'].iloc[all_indices].str.contains(genre, case=False, na=False)
            genre_boost[mask] += 0.2
            
    final_scores = rrf_scores + (0.1 * pop) + genre_boost
    
    # Get top_k
    top_indices = all_indices[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 800
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # RRF params
    k_rrf = 60
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    bm25_sorted = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidates])[::-1]
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    
    # Map ranks
    rank_map_b = {idx: r for r, idx in enumerate(candidates[bm25_sorted])}
    rank_map_s = {idx: r for r, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0])}
    
    # Genre boost calculation (vectorized)
    genre_mask = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    query_lower = query.lower()
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        genres = df['genres'].iloc[idx].lower()
        # Boost if genre match found in query
        if any(g.strip() in query_lower for g in genres.split(',')):
            genre_mask[i] = 0.5
            
    # Popularity normalization
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        score = 0
        if idx in rank_map_b:
            score += 1.0 / (k_rrf + rank_map_b[idx])
        if idx in rank_map_s:
            score += 1.0 / (k_rrf + rank_map_s[idx])
        
        rrf_scores[i] = score + (genre_mask[i] * 0.2) + (pop_norm[i] * 0.1)
        
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Expand query with common genre keywords to assist semantic retrieval
    genre_expansion = " action adventure animation comedy crime documentary drama family fantasy history horror music mystery romance science fiction thriller war western"
    query_vec = model.encode([query + genre_expansion]).astype("float32")
    
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # RRF rank aggregation
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    rank_map = {}
    k = 60
    
    # BM25 RRF contribution
    b_scores = bm25_scores[candidates]
    b_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(-b_scores))
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        rank_map[idx] = rank_map.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (k + b_ranks[i])
        
    # Semantic RRF contribution
    s_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(dists[0]))
    s_map = {idx: r for idx, r in zip(idx_s[0], s_ranks)}
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        if idx in s_map:
            rank_map[idx] += 1.0 / (k + s_map[idx])
            
    # Genre boost: identify genres in query and boost matching movies
    q_lower = query.lower()
    genre_mask = df['genres'].apply(lambda x: any(g.lower() in q_lower for g in x.split('|')))
    
    final_scores = np.array([rank_map[idx] for idx in candidates])
    final_scores[genre_mask.iloc[candidates].values] *= 1.2
    
    # Popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    final_scores += (0.01 * pop)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 400)
    
    # Get top BM25 candidates
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -400)[-400:]
    
    # Combine candidate pool
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Pre-calculate scores
    s_b = bm25_scores[candidates]
    s_b = (s_b - s_b.min()) / (s_b.max() - s_b.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Map vector distances
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_s = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 5.0)) for i in candidates])
    
    # Genre boost: simple overlap
    query_lower = query.lower()
    genre_scores = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        genres = df['genres'].iloc[idx].lower()
        # Count genre word matches in query
        genre_scores[i] = sum(1 for g in ["action", "adventure", "animation", "comedy", "crime", "documentary", "drama", "family", "fantasy", "history", "horror", "music", "mystery", "romance", "science fiction", "thriller", "war", "western"] if g in genres and g in query_lower)
    
    genre_boost = 1.0 + (genre_scores * 0.2)
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    
    # Final scoring: Hybrid fusion with genre and popularity bias
    final_scores = (0.6 * s_s + 0.4 * s_b) * genre_boost + (0.02 * pop)
    
    # Sort and return top_k
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Increase pool size to capture more candidates for reranking
    pool_size = 400
    
    # BM25 candidates
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    # Semantic candidates
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Union of candidates
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Prepare scores
    b_scores = bm25_scores[candidates]
    b_scores = (b_scores - b_scores.min()) / (b_scores.max() - b_scores.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Semantic scores: convert L2 distance to similarity
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_scores = np.array([1.0 / (1.0 + dist_map.get(i, 10.0)) for i in candidates])
    s_scores = (s_scores - s_scores.min()) / (s_scores.max() - s_scores.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Genre-based boosting: check for query terms in genre strings
    genre_text = df['genres'].iloc[candidates].str.lower().values
    genre_boost = np.array([1.0 + sum(0.2 for t in tokens if t in g) for g in genre_text])
    
    # Log-popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # Combined RRF-style fusion with genre and popularity bias
    final_scores = (0.4 * b_scores + 0.4 * s_scores) * genre_boost + (0.2 * pop)
    
    # Select top k
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # Retrieval
    pool_size = 400
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # RRF scoring
    all_indices = np.union1d(idx_b, idx_s[0])
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(all_indices))
    
    # BM25 RRF
    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_indices])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(bm25_ranks):
        rrf_scores[r] += 1 / (60 + r)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    idx_s_flat = idx_s[0]
    for r, idx_raw in enumerate(idx_s_flat):
        pos = np.where(all_indices == idx_raw)[0]
        if len(pos) > 0:
            rrf_scores[pos[0]] += 1 / (60 + r)
            
    # Genre-overlap boosting
    query_genres = [g.lower() for g in re.findall(r'\w+', query.lower()) if g in ["comedy", "action", "horror", "drama", "romance", "sci-fi", "thriller", "fantasy", "musical", "western", "crime"]]
    if query_genres:
        for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices):
            movie_genres = df['genres'].iloc[idx].lower()
            overlap = sum(1 for g in query_genres if g in movie_genres)
            if overlap > 0:
                rrf_scores[i] *= (1.0 + (0.2 * overlap))
                
    # Title-token density boost
    for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices):
        title = df['title'].iloc[idx].lower()
        matches = sum(1 for t in tokens if t in title)
        if matches > 0:
            rrf_scores[i] *= (1.0 + (0.1 * matches))
            
    # Popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[all_indices].values)
    final_scores = rrf_scores + (0.01 * pop)
    
    top_indices = all_indices[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")
description: Use RRF with genre-intersection boosting and title-token overlap scoring to improve rank precision for long-tail and ambiguous queries.

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Candidate pool expansion to improve recall
    pool_size = 500
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # RRF dictionary
    rrf_scores = {}
    
    # BM25 RRF
    for i, idx in enumerate(idx_b):
        rank = pool_size - i
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for i, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rank = pool_size - i
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
    
    # Apply genre-based boosting to the RRF scores
    # Extract genres present in query if any match
    query_genres = [g for g in ["action", "adventure", "animation", "comedy", "crime", "documentary", "drama", "family", "fantasy", "history", "horror", "music", "mystery", "romance", "science fiction", "thriller", "war", "western"] if g in query.lower()]
    
    for idx in rrf_scores:
        if query_genres:
            movie_genres = str(df.iloc[idx]['genres']).lower()
            match_count = sum(1 for g in query_genres if g in movie_genres)
            if match_count > 0:
                rrf_scores[idx] *= (1.0 + (0.5 * match_count))
        
        # Boost based on vote_count (log scale)
        rrf_scores[idx] *= (1.0 + 0.1 * np.log1p(df.iloc[idx]['vote_count']))

    # Extract top results
    indices = np.array(list(rrf_scores.keys()))
    scores = np.array(list(rrf_scores.values()))
    top_indices = indices[np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    query_tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(query_tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 400)
    
    # Identify unique candidates and build rank mappings
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:], idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Genre affinity signal
    genre_mask = df['genres'].str.lower().apply(lambda x: any(t in x for t in query_tokens)).values.astype(float)
    
    # Popularity signal
    pop_score = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    pop_score = (pop_score - pop_score.min()) / (pop_score.max() - pop_score.min() + 1e-9)
    
    # RRF scoring
    rrf_score = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 ranks
    bm25_rank = np.argsort(np.argsort(bm25_scores))
    rrf_score[candidates] += 1.0 / (60 + (len(df) - bm25_rank[candidates]))
    
    # Vector ranks
    for i, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_score[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + i)
        
    # Combine with signals
    final_scores = rrf_score + (0.3 * genre_mask) + (0.1 * pop_score)
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(final_scores[candidates])[-top_k:][::-1]
    res = df.iloc[candidates[top_indices]].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieve candidates
    pool_size = 500
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # RRF ranks
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 rank
    b_scores_subset = bm25_scores[all_indices]
    b_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(-b_scores_subset))
    rrf_scores[all_indices] += 1.0 / (60.0 + b_ranks)
    
    # Semantic rank
    s_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(dists[0]))
    rrf_scores[idx_s[0]] += 1.0 / (60.0 + s_ranks)
    
    # Genre boost
    genre_list = df['genres'].str.lower().tolist()
    query_genres = [t for t in tokens if any(t in g for g in genre_list)]
    if query_genres:
        for idx in all_indices:
            match_count = sum(1 for g in query_genres if g in genre_list[idx])
            rrf_scores[idx] *= (1.0 + 0.5 * match_count)
            
    # Title match boost
    titles = df['title'].str.lower().tolist()
    for idx in all_indices:
        title_tokens = _bm25_tokenize(titles[idx])
        overlap = sum(1 for t in tokens if t in title_tokens)
        rrf_scores[idx] *= (1.0 + 0.3 * overlap)
    
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    rrf_scores[all_indices] *= (1.0 + 0.1 * pop_norm[all_indices])
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 300
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    candidate_map = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(candidates)}
    
    # RRF rank BM25
    b_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidates])[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(b_ranks):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60.0 + rank)
        
    # RRF rank Semantic
    s_ranks = np.argsort(dists[0])[::-1] # higher L2 = worse
    for rank, idx_val in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        if idx_val in candidate_map:
            rrf_scores[candidate_map[idx_val]] += 1.0 / (60.0 + rank)
            
    # Genre boost: identify genres in query
    query_lower = query.lower()
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        genres = str(df.iloc[idx]['genres']).lower()
        if any(g.strip() in query_lower for g in genres.split('|')):
            genre_boost[i] = 0.5
            
    # Popularity boost: log-normalized
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores + (0.2 * genre_boost) + (0.1 * pop)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # 1. Retrieval
    pool_size = 500
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # 2. RRF Scores
    rrf_scores = {}
    
    # BM25 RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_b[np.argsort(bm25_scores[idx_b])[::-1]]):
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] = rrf_scores.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # 3. Boosting
    # Title match boost
    query_words = set(tokens)
    for idx in rrf_scores:
        title_tokens = _bm25_tokenize(df.iloc[idx]['title'])
        overlap = len(query_words.intersection(title_tokens))
        if overlap > 0:
            rrf_scores[idx] *= (1.0 + 0.5 * overlap)
            
    # Genre boost
    query_genres = [g.lower() for g in df['genres'].iloc[0:1].tolist() if g] # Heuristic context
    for idx in rrf_scores:
        movie_genres = str(df.iloc[idx]['genres']).lower()
        if any(token in movie_genres for token in tokens if len(token) > 3):
            rrf_scores[idx] *= 1.2
            
    # 4. Final selection
    sorted_indices = sorted(rrf_scores, key=rrf_scores.get, reverse=True)[:top_k]
    return df.iloc[sorted_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Expand retrieval pool size to cover long-tail and niche queries
    pool_size = 500
    
    # Lexical retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    # Semantic retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) parameters
    k_rrf = 60
    ranks = {}
    
    def update_ranks(indices, scores, factor):
        for i, idx in enumerate(indices):
            # Sort order: higher score = better rank
            rank = i
            ranks[idx] = ranks.get(idx, 0) + factor / (k_rrf + rank)

    # BM25 RRF
    bm25_sorted_idx = np.argsort(bm25_scores[idx_b])[::-1]
    update_ranks(idx_b[bm25_sorted_idx], bm25_scores[idx_b[bm25_sorted_idx]], 1.0)
    
    # Semantic RRF
    update_ranks(idx_s[0], dists[0], 1.0)
    
    # Genre-based boosting
    query_lower = query.lower()
    for idx in ranks:
        row = df.iloc[idx]
        genre_match = sum(1 for g in row['genres'].split('|') if g.lower() in query_lower)
        if genre_match > 0:
            ranks[idx] += 0.5
            
    # Popularity boost (log-scaled)
    for idx in ranks:
        ranks[idx] += 0.1 * np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[idx])
        
    # Final sort
    final_indices = sorted(ranks.keys(), key=lambda x: ranks[x], reverse=True)[:top_k]
    
    return df.iloc[final_indices].to_dict("records")

import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Increase pool size to 500 to cover more candidates
    pool_size = 500
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # RRF constants
    k = 60
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    
    # Map index to position for RRF
    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidates])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(bm25_ranks):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (k + r)
        
    semantic_ranks = np.argsort(dists[0])[::-1]
    # We match the semantic indices to the candidates array
    s_idx_map = {orig_idx: r for r, orig_idx in enumerate(idx_s[0])}
    for i, cand_idx in enumerate(candidates):
        if cand_idx in s_idx_map:
            rrf_scores[i] += 1.0 / (k + s_idx_map[cand_idx])
            
    # Apply genre boost: check if query words overlap with genres
    query_tokens = set(tokens)
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    for i, cand_idx in enumerate(candidates):
        genres = str(df['genres'].iloc[cand_idx]).lower()
        match_count = sum(1 for token in query_tokens if token in genres)
        if match_count > 0:
            genre_boost[i] = 0.5 * match_count
            
    # Popularity boost: log-scale vote counts
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    pop_boost = 0.05 * (pop / (pop.max() + 1e-9))
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores + genre_boost + pop_boost
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    rrf_scores += 1.0 / (60 + s_ranks)
    
    # Genre boost: identify genres in target overview/genres
    if query_genres:
        for g in query_genres:
            genre_mask = df['genres'].str.contains(g, case=False, na=False).values
            rrf_scores[genre_mask] *= 1.2
            
    # Popularity boost (dampened)
    rrf_scores *= (1.0 + 0.1 * np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values) / np.log1p(df['vote_count'].max()))
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    title_mask = df['title'].str.lower().apply(lambda x: any(t in x.lower() for t in tokens))

    k = 60
    
    # Get ranks
    pool_size = 400
    b_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[::-1]
    
    b_map = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(b_ranks[:pool_size])}
    s_map = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0])}
    
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([b_ranks[:pool_size], idx_s[0]]))
    
    scores = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    for i, cid in enumerate(candidates):
        score = 0.0
        if cid in b_map:
            score += 1.0 / (k + b_map[cid])
        if cid in s_map:
            score += 1.0 / (k + s_map[cid])
        
        # Genre boost: simple overlap
        genres = str(df['genres'].iloc[cid]).lower()
        if any(g in genres for g in tokens):
            score *= 1.2
            
        scores[i] = score
        
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Increase pool size to capture more relevant candidates
    pool_size = 1000
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Create dictionary for RRF ranks
    rank_map = {}
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    b_scores = bm25_scores[idx_b]
    b_order = np.argsort(b_scores)[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(idx_b[b_order]):
        rank_map[idx] = rank_map.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60.0 + r)
        
    # Semantic Ranks
    for r, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rank_map[idx] = rank_map.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60.0 + r)
        
    # Reranking with genre and popularity boost
    candidates = np.array(list(rank_map.keys()))
    scores = np.array([rank_map[i] for i in candidates])
    
    # Genre boost
    query_genres = [g.lower() for g in tokens if g in ['action', 'comedy', 'drama', 'horror', 'sci-fi', 'thriller', 'romance', 'adventure']]
    if query_genres:
        for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
            movie_genres = str(df['genres'].iloc[idx]).lower()
            if any(g in movie_genres for g in query_genres):
                scores[i] *= 1.5
                
    # Popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    scores += 0.01 * pop
    
    # Final selection
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):

    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)

    k_rrf = 60
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:], idx_s[0]]))

    query_lower = query.lower()
    df_genres = df['genres'].str.lower()
    genre_matches = df_genres.apply(lambda x: any(g in query_lower for g in x.split('|')) if isinstance(x, str) else False)
    genre_ranked = np.where(genre_matches)[0]
    genre_ranks = {idx: r for r, idx in enumerate(genre_ranked)}

        score = 0
        if idx in bm25_ranks:
            score += 1.0 / (k_rrf + bm25_ranks[idx])
        if idx in semantic_ranks:
            score += 1.0 / (k_rrf + semantic_ranks[idx])
        if idx in genre_ranks:
            score += 1.0 / (k_rrf + genre_ranks[idx])

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # Candidate set
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Prepare RRF scores
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 RRF
    # Apply title boost: increase score for movies where title words match query tokens
    title_tokens = df['title'].str.lower().apply(_bm25_tokenize)
    boost = np.array([sum(1 for t in tokens if t in title) for title in title_tokens])
    bm25_final = bm25_scores + (boost * 5.0)
    
    sorted_b = np.argsort(bm25_final)[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(sorted_b[:300]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Genre boost: identify genres in query
    query_genres = [g for g in df['genres'].unique() if isinstance(g, str) and g.lower() in query.lower()]
    if query_genres:
        genre_mask = df['genres'].str.contains('|'.join(query_genres), case=False, na=False).values
        rrf_scores[genre_mask] *= 1.5
        
    # Popularity adjustment (log-dampened)
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    final_scores = rrf_scores * (1.0 + 0.2 * pop_norm)
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(final_scores[candidates])[::-1][:top_k]
    return df.iloc[candidates[top_indices]].to_dict("records")
description: implement genre-aware RRF with title-boosted BM25 and popularity dampening

import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # Retrieval
    pool_size = 500
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # RRF Scoring
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(all_indices))
    
    idx_map = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices)}
    
    # BM25 Rank
    b_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_indices])[::-1]
    for r, i in enumerate(b_ranks):
        rrf_scores[i] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Semantic Rank
    s_ranks = np.argsort(dists[0])[::-1]
    for r, i in enumerate(s_ranks):
        idx = idx_s[0][i]
        rrf_scores[idx_map[idx]] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Genre Boosting
    query_genres = [g.strip().lower() for g in re.split(r'[, ]', query.lower()) if len(g) > 3]
    if query_genres:
        for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices):
            movie_genres = df['genres'].iloc[idx].lower()
            match_count = sum(1 for g in query_genres if g in movie_genres)
            if match_count > 0:
                rrf_scores[i] *= (1.0 + 0.2 * match_count)
                
    # Popularity Bias
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[all_indices].values)
    rrf_scores += 0.05 * (pop / pop.max())
    
    top_indices = all_indices[np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Use BM25 on the full text field
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Retrieve candidates using BM25 and Semantic search
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Combine candidate pools
    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Initialize RRF scores
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # Rank BM25 candidates
    sorted_b = np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_indices])[::-1]
    for rank, idx_in_pool in enumerate(sorted_b):
        idx = all_indices[idx_in_pool]
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60.0 + rank)
        
    # Rank Semantic candidates
    # idx_s is sorted by distance (ascending)
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60.0 + rank)
        
    # Genre-overlap boost: check if query tokens appear in genre strings
    genre_hits = np.zeros(len(df))
    genre_series = df['genres'].str.lower()
    for token in tokens:
        if len(token) > 2:
            genre_hits += genre_series.str.contains(token, regex=False).astype(int)
            
    # Apply genre-based boost to RRF scores
    final_scores = rrf_scores + (0.15 * genre_hits)
    
    # Final retrieval
    top_indices = np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 expansion: include title-specific terms
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Candidate pool
    pool_size = 500
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Candidates
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # Ranking signals
    # 1. BM25 score
    b_scores = bm25_scores[candidates]
    b_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(-b_scores))
    
    # 2. Vector distance
    dist_map = {idx: d for i, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]) for d in [dists[0][i]]}
    v_scores = np.array([dist_map.get(c, 10.0) for c in candidates])
    v_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(v_scores))
    
    # 3. Genre affinity (binary match)
    query_lower = query.lower()
    genre_scores = np.array([1.0 if any(g.lower() in query_lower for g in df['genres'].iloc[c].split('|')) else 0.0 for c in candidates])
    
    # RRF with genre boost
    rrf_score = (1.0 / (60.0 + b_ranks)) + (1.0 / (60.0 + v_ranks)) + (genre_scores * 0.05)
    
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    final_scores = rrf_score + (pop * 0.001)
    
    # Top K
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(-final_scores)[:top_k]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    pool_size = 500
    idx_b = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-pool_size:][::-1]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # RRF dictionary
    rrf = {}
    
    # Add BM25 ranks
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_b):
        rrf[idx] = rrf.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Add Semantic ranks
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf[idx] = rrf.get(idx, 0) + 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Genre-affinity boosting
    # Create simple genre match score
    query_genres = [g.strip().lower() for g in re.split(r'[, ]+', query.lower())]
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(df))
    for g in query_genres:
        if len(g) > 2:
            mask = df['genres'].str.contains(g, case=False, na=False)
            genre_boost[mask] += 0.2
            
    # Popularity log-dampening
    pop_score = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values) / np.log1p(df['vote_count'].max())
    
    # Final aggregation
    results = []
    for idx, rrf_score in rrf.items():
        final_score = rrf_score + (genre_boost[idx] * 0.3) + (pop_score[idx] * 0.1)
        results.append((idx, final_score))
        
    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    top_indices = [r[0] for r in results[:top_k]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")
