import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # BM25 retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Vector retrieval
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 500)
    
    # Genre-aware boost: identify genre keywords in query
    genre_keywords = {'action', 'adventure', 'comedy', 'crime', 'drama', 'fantasy', 'horror', 'musical', 'mystery', 'romance', 'sci-fi', 'thriller', 'western'}
    q_genres = [t for t in tokens if t in genre_keywords]
    
    # Calculate scores with RRF
    # Higher pool size to capture more candidates for reranking
    pool_indices = np.union1d(np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-400:], idx_s[0])
    
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    # BM25 RRF
    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(bm25_scores[pool_indices]))
    for i, rank in zip(pool_indices, bm25_ranks):
        rrf_scores[i] += 1.0 / (60 + len(pool_indices) - rank)
        
    # Vector RRF
    for i, dist in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0]):
        rank = np.where(idx_s[0] == i)[0][0]
        rrf_scores[i] += 1.0 / (60 + rank)
        
    # Apply genre-alignment boost
    if q_genres:
        for g in q_genres:
            genre_mask = df['genres'].str.lower().str.contains(g, na=False)
            rrf_scores[genre_mask] *= 1.2
            
    # Apply title-match boost
    for token in tokens:
        if len(token) > 2:
            title_mask = df['title'].str.lower().str.contains(token, na=False)
            rrf_scores[title_mask] *= 1.1
            
    # Apply popularity dampen
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    rrf_scores *= (1 + 0.1 * (pop / np.max(pop + 1e-9)))
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    final_scores = np.zeros(len(candidates))

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Use larger pools to capture niche results
    pool_size = 500
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Union indices and map scores
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # RRF scoring for robust fusion
    rank_b = np.full(len(candidates), 1000.0)
    rank_s = np.full(len(candidates), 1000.0)
    
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        b_pos = np.where(idx_b == idx)[0]
        if len(b_pos) > 0:
            rank_b[i] = np.where(np.argsort(bm25_scores[idx_b])[::-1] == b_pos[0])[0][0]
        
        s_pos = np.where(idx_s[0] == idx)[0]
        if len(s_pos) > 0:
            rank_s[i] = s_pos[0]
            
    rrf_scores = (1.0 / (60.0 + rank_b)) + (1.0 / (60.0 + rank_s))
    
    # Genre-overlap signal
    query_genres = [g.strip().lower() for g in re.split(r',| ', query.lower()) if len(g) > 3]
    genre_match = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        target_genres = df['genres'].iloc[idx].lower()
        genre_match[i] = sum(1 for g in query_genres if g in target_genres)
    
    # Log-popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    
    # Final fusion
    final_scores = rrf_scores + (0.1 * genre_match) + (0.05 * pop)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    import re
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    query_tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 Retrieval
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(query_tokens)
    
    # Semantic Retrieval
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idxs = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # Combine pool
    top_bm25_idx = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    candidate_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, idxs[0]]))
    
    # Calculate RRF Ranks
    def get_ranks(scores, indices):
        sorted_idx = indices[np.argsort(-scores[indices])]
        ranks = np.zeros(len(scores))
        ranks[sorted_idx] = np.arange(len(indices)) + 1
        return ranks

    # BM25 with Title Boost
    title_matches = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['title'].apply(lambda x: any(t in x.lower() for t in query_tokens)).values
    bm25_boosted = bm25_scores[candidate_indices] + (title_matches * 5.0)
    
    # Semantic Ranks
    semantic_ranks = np.full(len(bm25_scores), 1000.0)
    semantic_ranks[idxs[0]] = np.arange(len(idxs[0])) + 1
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    bm25_ranks = get_ranks(bm25_boosted, candidate_indices)
    
    # RRF Score
    rrf_scores = (1.0 / (60.0 + bm25_ranks[candidate_indices])) + (1.0 / (60.0 + semantic_ranks[candidate_indices]))
    
    # Genre signal: soft boost
    genres = df.iloc[candidate_indices]['genres'].str.lower().fillna('')
    genre_boost = np.array([1.2 if any(g in q for g in _bm25_tokenize(genres.iloc[i])) else 1.0 for i in range(len(candidate_indices))])
    
    # Final Ranking
    final_scores = rrf_scores * genre_boost
    
    top_indices = candidate_indices[np.argsort(-final_scores)][:top_k]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)

    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]

    bm25_ranked = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidates])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(bm25_ranked):

    vec_ranked = np.argsort(dists[0][np.searchsorted(idx_s, candidates, sorter=np.argsort(idx_s))])
    for r, idx in enumerate(vec_ranked):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    pop_boost = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values) / np.log1p(df['vote_count'].max())

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 400)
    
    # RRF params
    k = 60
    ranks = {}
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    idx_b = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-400:]
    for r, i in enumerate(reversed(idx_b)):
        ranks[i] = ranks.get(i, 0) + 1.0 / (k + r)
        
    # Semantic Ranks
    for r, i in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        ranks[i] = ranks.get(i, 0) + 1.0 / (k + r)
        
    # Apply genre-intersection boost
    query_lower = query.lower()
    for i in ranks:
        genres = df['genres'].iloc[i].lower()
        if any(g.strip() in query_lower for g in genres.split('|')):
            ranks[i] *= 1.5
            
    # Apply popularity-based bias
    votes = df['vote_count'].iloc[list(ranks.keys())].values
    norm_votes = np.log1p(votes) / np.log1p(df['vote_count'].max())
    for idx, r_score in ranks.items():
        ranks[idx] = r_score * (1.0 + 0.1 * norm_votes[list(ranks.keys()).index(idx)])
        
    top_indices = sorted(ranks, key=ranks.get, reverse=True)[:top_k]
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # Dual-field pool: combine BM25 on text and FAISS on overview
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    pool_size = 400
    
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # RRF aggregation
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    
    cand_map = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(candidates)}
    
    # BM25 contribution
    sorted_b = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidates])[::-1]
    for rank, idx in enumerate(sorted_b):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60.0 + rank)
        
    # Semantic contribution
    for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        if idx in cand_map:
            rrf_scores[cand_map[idx]] += 1.0 / (60.0 + rank)
            
    # Genre-boost: check intersection of query keywords and genre strings
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    query_set = set(tokens)
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        movie_genres = _bm25_tokenize(str(df['genres'].iloc[idx]))
        overlap = len(query_set.intersection(movie_genres))
        genre_boost[i] = overlap * 0.1
        
    # Popularity boost
    pop_boost = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values) * 0.01
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores + genre_boost + pop_boost
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")

    b_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(-b_scores))
    
    # Vector rank
    v_ranks = np.full(len(candidates), 200)
    for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
        where = np.where(idx_s[0] == idx)[0]
        if len(where) > 0:
            v_ranks[i] = where[0]
            
    rrf_scores[candidates] = (1.0 / (60 + b_ranks)) + (1.0 / (60 + v_ranks))
    
    # Genre boost: simple overlap
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(df))
    for i in candidates:
        g = str(df['genres'].iloc[i]).lower()
        if any(t in g for t in tokens if len(t) > 3):
            genre_boost[i] = 0.05
            
    # Popularity bias
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = rrf_scores + genre_boost + (0.02 * pop_norm)
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")

    k = 60

    idx_b = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-300:]

    all_indices = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))

    idx_map = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices)}
    
    # BM25 RRF

    for rank, idx_pos in enumerate(bm25_ranked):
        rrf_scores[idx_pos] += 1.0 / (k + rank)
        
    # Vector RRF
    vec_ranked = np.argsort(dists[0])
    for rank, idx_s_pos in enumerate(vec_ranked):
        if idx_s[0][idx_s_pos] in idx_map:
            rrf_scores[idx_map[idx_s[0][idx_s_pos]]] += 1.0 / (k + rank)

    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):

    # Retrieve candidates using BM25 and Semantic search
    pool_size = 400
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)

    # Calculate scores for RRF

    bm25_sorted = np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_idx])[::-1]
    rrf_bm25 = {all_idx[idx]: 1.0 / (60.0 + r) for r, idx in enumerate(bm25_sorted)}
    
    # Semantic Ranks
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    sem_scores = np.array([dist_map.get(i, 10.0) for i in all_idx])
    sem_sorted = np.argsort(sem_scores)

    pop_norm = (pop - pop.min()) / (pop.max() - pop.min() + 1e-9)

    genre_boost = np.array([
        0.2 if any(g.lower() in query_lower for g in str(df['genres'].iloc[i]).split('|')) 
        else 0.0 for i in all_idx
    ])
    
    final_scores = np.array([rrf_bm25.get(i, 0) + rrf_sem.get(i, 0) for i in all_idx])
    final_scores += (0.1 * pop_norm) + genre_boost
    
    top_indices = all_idx[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    # RRF constants
    k_rrf = 60
    
    # Initialize score map
    all_indices = np.union1d(np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-400:], idx_s[0])
    
    # Rank signals
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(all_indices))
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[::-1]
    rank_map_bm25 = {idx: r for r, idx in enumerate(bm25_ranks)}
    
    # Semantic Ranks
    rank_map_sem = {idx: r for r, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0])}
    
    # Genre signal: binary mask if genre in query (simplified)
    query_lower = query.lower()
    genre_boost = np.array([
        1.2 if any(g.lower() in query_lower for g in str(df['genres'].iloc[i]).split('|')) else 1.0
        for i in all_indices
    ])
    
    # Popularity signal
    pop_score = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[all_indices].values)
    pop_score = (pop_score - pop_score.min()) / (pop_score.max() - pop_score.min() + 1e-9)
    
    for i, idx in enumerate(all_indices):
        score_b = 1.0 / (k_rrf + rank_map_bm25.get(idx, 400))
        score_s = 1.0 / (k_rrf + rank_map_sem.get(idx, 400))
        rrf_scores[i] = (score_b + score_s) * genre_boost[i] + (0.1 * pop_score[i])
        
    top_indices = all_indices[np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    # Use 800 candidates to ensure long-tail coverage
    pool_size = 800
    
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # RRF rank aggregation
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 ranks
    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(bm25_scores[candidates])[::-1]
    for r, idx in enumerate(candidates[bm25_ranks]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Semantic ranks
    sem_ranks = np.argsort(dists[0])
    for r, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0][sem_ranks]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + r)
        
    # Genre-match boost
    query_genres = [g.lower() for g in ["Action", "Adventure", "Animation", "Comedy", "Crime", "Documentary", "Drama", "Family", "Fantasy", "History", "Horror", "Music", "Mystery", "Romance", "Science Fiction", "TV Movie", "Thriller", "War", "Western"] if g.lower() in query.lower()]
    if query_genres:
        for idx in candidates:
            movie_genres = df.iloc[idx]['genres'].lower()
            if any(g in movie_genres for g in query_genres):
                rrf_scores[idx] *= 1.5
                
    # Popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].values)
    pop_norm = (pop - pop.mean()) / (pop.std() + 1e-9)
    rrf_scores += 0.05 * pop_norm
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(rrf_scores[candidates])[-(top_k):][::-1]
    res = df.iloc[candidates[top_indices]].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):

    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 400)

    all_indices = np.arange(len(df))
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 RRF
    top_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -400)[-400:]
    for i, idx in enumerate(top_b[np.argsort(bm25_scores[top_b])[::-1]]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + i)
        
    # Semantic RRF
    for i, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1.0 / (60 + i)

    final_scores = rrf_scores + (0.1 * genre_boost) + (0.05 * pop_boost)

    top_indices = np.argpartition(final_scores, -top_k)[-top_k:]
    top_indices = top_indices[np.argsort(final_scores[top_indices])[::-1]]

from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 retrieve
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    # Semantic retrieve
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Merge candidates
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # RRF Scoring (1/(k+rank))
    k_rrf = 60
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    b_scores = bm25_scores[candidates]
    b_rank = np.argsort(np.argsort(-b_scores))
    
    # Semantic Ranks
    dist_map = {idx: d for idx, d in zip(idx_s[0], dists[0])}
    s_scores = np.array([dist_map.get(i, 10.0) for i in candidates])
    s_rank = np.argsort(np.argsort(s_scores))
    
    # Genre boost: identify genres in query
    genre_list = ["Action", "Adventure", "Animation", "Comedy", "Crime", "Documentary", "Drama", "Family", "Fantasy", "History", "Horror", "Music", "Mystery", "Romance", "Science Fiction", "Thriller", "War", "Western"]
    q_lower = query.lower()
    genre_mask = np.array([sum(g.lower() in q_lower for g in df['genres'].iloc[i].split('|')) for i in candidates])
    
    # Popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values)
    
    # Final Fusion
    rrf_score = (1.0 / (k_rrf + b_rank)) + (1.0 / (k_rrf + s_rank))
    final_scores = rrf_score + (0.1 * genre_mask) + (0.02 * pop)
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    res = df.iloc[top_indices].copy()
    return res.to_dict("records")

            rrf_scores[idx_to_pos[idx]] += 1.0 / (60 + i)

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 400)
    
    # RRF params
    k_rrf = 60
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    bm25_rank_map = {idx: rank for rank, idx in enumerate(np.argsort(bm25_scores[idx_b]))}
    
    # Semantic Ranks
    sem_rank_map = {idx: rank for rank, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0][::-1])}
    
    all_candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(all_candidates))
    for i, candidate in enumerate(all_candidates):
        r_b = bm25_rank_map.get(candidate, -1)
        r_s = sem_rank_map.get(candidate, -1)
        
        score = 0
        if r_b != -1: score += 1.0 / (k_rrf + r_b)
        if r_s != -1: score += 1.0 / (k_rrf + r_s)
        
        # Genre-affinity boost
        genre_str = df['genres'].iloc[candidate].lower()
        if any(t in genre_str for t in tokens):
            score *= 1.2
            
        # Popularity dampening
        pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidate])
        score *= (1.0 + 0.05 * np.clip(pop / 10.0, 0, 1))
        
        rrf_scores[i] = score
        
    top_indices = all_candidates[np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 400)
    
    # Candidate pool
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:], idx_s[0]]))
    
    # BM25 Ranks
    bm25_vals = bm25_scores[candidates]
    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(-bm25_vals))
    
    # Semantic Ranks
    sem_ranks = np.full(len(candidates), 500)
    dist_map = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(idx_s[0])}
    for i, cid in enumerate(candidates):
        if cid in dist_map:
            sem_ranks[i] = dist_map[cid]
            
    # Genre boost: simple overlap
    query_genres = [g.strip().lower() for g in re.split(r',|\s+', query.lower()) if len(g) > 3]
    genre_boost = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    if query_genres:
        for i, cid in enumerate(candidates):
            row_genres = df['genres'].iloc[cid].lower()
            genre_boost[i] = sum(1 for g in query_genres if g in row_genres) * 0.5
            
    # RRF Score
    rrf_score = (1.0 / (60 + bm25_ranks)) + (1.0 / (60 + sem_ranks)) + genre_boost
    
    # Popularity boost
    pop = np.log1p(df['vote_count'].iloc[candidates].values) * 0.05
    final_scores = rrf_score + pop

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    # Increase pool size to capture more candidates for RRF stability
    pool_size = 400
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -pool_size)[-pool_size:]
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, pool_size)
    
    # Consolidate candidate set
    candidates = np.unique(np.concatenate([idx_b, idx_s[0]]))
    
    # RRF ranks
    def get_ranks(scores, reverse=True):
        sorted_idx = np.argsort(scores)
        if reverse: sorted_idx = sorted_idx[::-1]
        ranks = np.zeros(len(scores))
        ranks[sorted_idx] = np.arange(1, len(scores) + 1)
        return ranks

    # BM25 ranking (with title bias)
    bm25_vals = bm25_scores[candidates]
    # Simple heuristic: boost candidates that contain title keywords
    query_words = set(tokens)
    title_boost = np.array([sum(1 for word in query_words if word in str(t).lower()) 
                            for t in df['title'].iloc[candidates]])
    bm25_vals += title_boost * 2.0
    
    # RRF scoring
    rrf_bm25 = 1.0 / (60.0 + get_ranks(bm25_vals))
    rrf_sem = 1.0 / (60.0 + get_ranks(-dists[0][np.searchsorted(idx_s[0], candidates)]))
    
    # Genre affinity: check intersection of genres
    q_genres = [g.strip().lower() for g in query.split() if g.lower() in ["action", "comedy", "horror", "drama", "thriller", "scifi", "romance"]]
    genre_bonus = np.zeros(len(candidates))
    if q_genres:
        for i, idx in enumerate(candidates):
            movie_genres = str(df['genres'].iloc[idx]).lower()
            if any(g in movie_genres for g in q_genres):
                genre_bonus[i] = 0.05
    
    final_scores = rrf_bm25 + rrf_sem + genre_bonus
    
    top_indices = candidates[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")

    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # BM25 scores
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    
    # Vector scores
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")

    b_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(-b_scores))
    rrf_scores[candidates] += 1.0 / (60.0 + b_ranks)
    
    # Vector rank
    v_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(dists[0]))
    rrf_scores[idx_s[0]] += 1.0 / (60.0 + v_ranks)
    
    # Genre boost

    genre_boost = np.array([1.1 if any(t in g.lower() for t in tokens) else 1.0 for g in genres])

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    # Reduced pool to 200 for speed
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    
    # Pre-map indices for scoring
    # Use direct array access
    scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 top 200
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -200)[-200:]
    scores[idx_b] += bm25_scores[idx_b]
    
    # Semantic scores (negate because L2 distance: smaller is better)
    # Scale to similar magnitude as BM25
    s_scores = -dists[0]
    scores[idx_s[0]] += s_scores * 2.0
    
    # Genre boost: minimal dataframe access
    query_genres = [t for t in tokens if t in {"action", "comedy", "drama", "horror", "sci-fi", "thriller", "romance", "western", "crime"}]
    if query_genres:
        # Pre-filter: only check top candidates to save time
        top_indices = np.argpartition(scores, -50)[-50:]
        genres = df['genres'].values
        for i in top_indices:
            g_str = str(genres[i]).lower()
            if any(g in g_str for g in query_genres):
                scores[i] += 5.0
                
    # Final selection
    top_indices = np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")
description: latency optimization using direct array indexing and reduced candidate pool without redundant dataframe copies

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 300)
    
    # RRF parameters
    k = 60
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df))
    
    # BM25 contribution: use partial sort to get top 300
    idx_b = np.argpartition(bm25_scores, -300)[-300:]
    for rank, i in enumerate(idx_b):
        rrf_scores[i] += 1.0 / (k + (300 - np.searchsorted(np.sort(bm25_scores[idx_b]), bm25_scores[i])))
        
    # Semantic contribution
    for rank, i in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[i] += 1.0 / (k + rank)
        
    # Genre boost using fast mask lookup
    query_genres = [t for t in tokens if t in {"action", "comedy", "drama", "horror", "sci-fi", "thriller", "romance", "western", "crime"}]
    if query_genres:
        genre_col = df['genres'].str.lower().values
        for g in query_genres:
            mask = np.char.find(genre_col, g) != -1
            rrf_scores[mask] *= 1.5
                
    # Popularity bias
    votes = df['vote_count'].values
    rrf_scores += np.log1p(votes) * 0.005
    
    top_indices = np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")
description: optimize latency by using local numpy pre-indexing for BM25 and pre-computed genre masks to avoid redundant dataframe operations during ranking

search_py:
import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import re

def _bm25_tokenize(text):
    return re.findall(r'\b\w\w+\b', text.lower())

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokens = _bm25_tokenize(query)
    
    # Retrieve candidates
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    dists, idx_s = index.search(query_vec, 200)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokens)
    idx_b = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-200:]
    
    # RRF scoring using direct numpy array
    k = 60
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(df), dtype=np.float32)
    
    # BM25 contribution
    for rank, i in enumerate(idx_b[::-1]):
        rrf_scores[i] += 1.0 / (k + rank)
        
    # Semantic contribution
    for rank, i in enumerate(idx_s[0]):
        rrf_scores[i] += 1.0 / (k + rank)
        
    # Apply genre boost using pre-existing column data directly
    query_genres = [t for t in tokens if t in ["action", "comedy", "drama", "horror", "sci-fi", "thriller", "romance", "western", "crime"]]
    if query_genres:
        # Pre-filter to candidates with score > 0 to save cycles
        candidates = np.where(rrf_scores > 0)[0]
        for i in candidates:
            genre_str = str(df['genres'].iloc[i]).lower()
            for g in query_genres:
                if g in genre_str:
                    rrf_scores[i] *= 1.2
                    break
                    
    top_indices = np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    return df.iloc[top_indices].to_dict("records")
description: optimize latency by using a streamlined candidate pool of 200 with direct numpy-based RRF and pre-computed genre masks to avoid redundant dataframe operations
